title: Split Pea and Spinach Dal
description: Delve into the vibrant and nourishing world of Indian cuisine with this flavorful Split Pea and Spinach Dal. This vegan recipe combines the earthy richness of split peas with the tender bite of fresh spinach, all enveloped in a warm, aromatic blend of spices. The dal is slow-cooked to perfection, allowing the spices to infuse and deepen in flavor, creating a dish that is both hearty and comforting. Ideal for a plant-based meal, this dal serves as a delicious and satisfying course, perfect for any time of the year. Its high nutrient content makes it not only a pleasure for the palate but also a boost for your health, embodying the essence of wholesome Indian cooking.
author: Vegor
steps: Rinse split peas under cold water and set aside.
In a large pot, heat oil over medium heat.
Add mustard seeds and cumin seeds. Sauté until they begin to pop.
Add onion, garlic, and ginger. Stir and cook until onions are translucent.
Add turmeric and mixed spices, sautéing for an additional minute.
Add spinach and salt, stirring until spinach is wilted.
Adjust seasoning as needed and serve warm.

title: Vegan Mille-Feuille
description: This vegan Mille-Feuille is a delightful twist on the classic French pastry, offering a rich and creamy experience without any animal products. The pastry sheets are perfectly flaky and golden, providing a delightful crunch with every bite. The vanilla custard filling is silky and luxurious, made from plant-based ingredients that deliver an exquisite taste. Topped delicately with a dusting of powdered sugar and a hint of vanilla glaze, it offers an indulgent yet light treat that everyone can enjoy. Ideal for any special occasion or as a decadent dessert after a satisfying meal, this vegan Mille-Feuille will impress both vegans and non-vegans alike with its refined flavor and elegant presentation.
author: Vegor
steps: Preheat oven to 200°C (390°F).
Roll out the vegan puff pastry on a lightly floured surface and cut into even rectangles.
Place pastry rectangles on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15 minutes or until golden brown and puffed.
In a saucepan, heat coconut milk and sugar over medium heat until sugar is dissolved.
Remove from heat and let the custard cool slightly.
Pipe or spread the custard onto a pastry rectangle, layer another pastry on top, and repeat.
Finish with a dusting of powdered sugar and a drizzle of vanilla glaze.
Chill in the refrigerator before serving.

title: Sweet Potato and Black Bean Chilli
description: This vegan Sweet Potato and Black Bean Chili is not only a wholesome delight but also a vibrant celebration of flavors. Perfectly balanced with the natural sweetness of sweet potatoes and the earthy richness of black beans, this dish is meticulously seasoned with a blend of smoky cumin, aromatic garlic, and a hint of zesty lime. It’s an enticing mix of textures and tastes, all simmered to create a hearty, soul-warming meal that’s ideal for both casual dinners and special gatherings. Easy to make and packed with nutrients, it’s a culinary delight that satisfies both in taste and health.
author: Vegor
ingredients: 2 medium sweet potatoes, peeled and diced
1 can black beans, drained and rinsed
steps: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onions and garlic, sauté until translucent.
Stir in diced sweet potatoes, bell pepper, and cumin, cook for 5 minutes.
Add canned tomatoes and black beans, bring to a simmer.
Cover and cook for 20 minutes until sweet potatoes are tender.
Serve warm, garnished with fresh cilantro.

title: Vegan Pea Basil Soup
description: This Vegan Pea Basil Soup is a delightful harmony of sweet peas and fresh basil, elevating the classic pea soup to a gourmet level. The recipe is simple yet sophisticated, perfect for a light lunch or a starter before dinner. The vibrant green color promises a fresh and flavorful experience. Made with fresh peas or frozen ones, it ensures a creamy and velvety texture without the need for dairy. The basil adds a fragrant, aromatic note that complements the sweetness of the peas perfectly. It’s a healthy and refreshing dish that’s sure to invigorate your palate.
author: Vegor
steps: Heat olive oil in a pot over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic, sauté until translucent.
Stir in peas and vegetable broth, bring to a boil.
Reduce heat, simmer for 10 minutes.
Add basil, salt, and pepper. Remove from heat.
Serve hot, garnished with extra basil if desired.

title: Vegan Spicy Pad Kee Mao
description: Spicy Pad Kee Mao, also known as ‘Drunken Noodles,’ is a popular Thai street food dish renowned for its bold, spicy flavors and aromatic ingredients. This vegan adaptation captures the essence of traditional Pad Kee Mao without compromising on taste or authenticity. By using a vibrant medley of fresh vegetables, flavorful plant-based proteins, and perfectly cooked rice noodles, this recipe delivers a deliciously satisfying meal that will delight your taste buds. The harmonious blend of soy sauce, chili, garlic, and basil creates a symphony of flavors that perfectly complements the chewy texture of the noodles. This dish not only brings the heat but also delivers a well-rounded and deeply satisfying culinary experience, making it a perfect choice for both casual weeknight dinners and special occasions alike.
author: Vegor
steps: Cook rice noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
Heat vegetable oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and sliced Thai chilis; sauté for 1-2 minutes.
Add sliced bell peppers, onions, and broccoli to the pan and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes.
Add tofu and continue to stir-fry until golden.
Toss in the cooked noodles and fresh basil leaves. Mix everything well.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, ensuring the noodles are fully coated with sauce.
Serve hot and garnish with extra basil if desired.

title: Vegan Lentil Sloppy Joe Sandwich
description: This Vegan Lentil Sloppy Joe Sandwich offers a delightful twist to the traditional version by substituting meat with hearty lentils. The dish is perfect for those who enjoy a rich and savory taste with layers of umami. Made with simple, wholesome ingredients, this recipe is not only delicious but also nutritious. Lentils are cooked with a medley of vegetables and spices to create a thick, flavorful filling. The mixture is then spooned onto whole-grain buns, providing a satisfying bite with every mouthful. Whether you’re serving it for lunch or dinner, this sandwich is sure to be a hit!
author: Vegor
steps: Rinse lentils and boil in water until tender.
Heat oil in a skillet and sauté onion and bell pepper.
Add garlic, cook for 1 minute, then add tomato sauce, paste, maple syrup, soy sauce, chili powder, and paprika.
Simmer until thickened; season to taste.
Serve lentil mixture on buns.

title: Vegan Paneer Vegetable Curry
description: This Vegan Paneer Vegetable Curry is a delightful and hearty dish that captures the essence of Indian flavors without the use of any animal-derived ingredients. The curry is made with tofu, marinated in rich spices to mimic the texture and taste of paneer. Fresh vegetables like bell peppers, peas, and carrots are simmered together with the tofu in a luscious, creamy tomato-based sauce, seasoned with garam masala, cumin, and turmeric. The dish is finished off with a touch of coconut milk, providing a smooth and velvety texture. Perfect for serving with rice or naan, this vegan curry is both satisfying and nutritious, offering a robust taste that’s sure to please everyone.
author: Vegor
steps: Press tofu to remove excess moisture. Marinate tofu cubes in cumin, turmeric, salt, and pepper for 10 minutes.
Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat. Sauté onions, garlic, and ginger until onions are translucent.
Add bell peppers, peas, and carrots to the pan and cook for 5 minutes.
Stir in marinated tofu and cook until lightly browned on all sides.
Pour in diced tomatoes and coconut milk, stirring well.
Garnish with fresh cilantro before serving with rice or naan.

title: Crispy Kale Chips
description: Discover the delightful crunch and savory flavor of homemade kale chips. These vegan snacks are not only easy to prepare, but they are also packed with nutritional benefits. Made with fresh kale leaves and simple seasonings, these chips are baked to perfection, offering a healthy alternative to traditional potato chips. Rich in vitamins and low in calories, kale chips are a guilt-free treat that you can enjoy any time. Whether you’re looking for a quick snack or a nutritious appetizer, these kale chips are sure to satisfy your cravings.
author: Vegor
steps: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
Wash and thoroughly dry the kale leaves.
Remove stems and tear the leaves into bite-sized pieces.
Drizzle olive oil over the leaves and sprinkle with sea salt and garlic powder.
Toss kale to ensure even coating.
Bake for 10-15 minutes until edges are brown but not burnt.
Cool and enjoy.

title: Vegan Broccoli Crouton Soup
description: This Vegan Broccoli Crouton Soup is a delightful blend of wholesome ingredients, perfect for those seeking a plant-based yet satisfying meal. The vibrant broccoli, combined with just the right mix of spices, creates a rich, creamy texture without any dairy. Topped with crunchy homemade croutons, this soup becomes a hearty dish that’s great for a comforting lunch or dinner. Ideal for all seasons, it packs in nutrients while offering a delicious umami flavor, making it a favorite for both vegans and non-vegans alike.
author: Vegor
ingredients: For Croutons: 2 cups cubed bread, 1 tablespoon olive oil, 1 teaspoon dried basil
steps: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic; sauté until onion is translucent.
Add broccoli florets and cook for 5 minutes.
Pour in vegetable broth and bring to a simmer.
Season with salt and pepper.
Transfer soup to a blender, add nutritional yeast, and blend until smooth.
To make croutons, toss bread cubes with olive oil and basil.
Bake in preheated oven (375°F) until golden, about 10 minutes.
Serve soup hot, topping with croutons.

title: Vegan Spinach and Feta Stuffed Mushrooms
description: These Vegan Spinach and Feta Stuffed Mushrooms are a delightful twist on a classic appetizer, perfect for vegan and non-vegan guests alike. Utilizing large, firm mushrooms as a base, they are expertly filled with a savory blend of sautéed spinach, vegan feta cheese, and aromatic spices. The combination of flavors results in a delectable umami-rich bite that is both satisfying and nutritious. Roasting the mushrooms elevates their natural earthiness, while the vegan feta adds a tangy contrast, making this recipe a standout choice for any gathering or meal.
author: Vegor
steps: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
Remove stems from mushrooms and clean caps.
Sauté garlic in olive oil, add spinach until wilted.
Mix in vegan feta, salt, and pepper.
Stuff each mushroom with the spinach mixture.
Serve warm.

title: Smoky Roasted Chickpeas
description: Smoky Roasted Chickpeas are a delightful, crunchy treat that captures the essence of both smoky and savory flavors, perfect for snacking or adding a crunchy element to salads and soups. The combination of smoked paprika and other spices adheres beautifully to the chickpeas, providing a robust taste that will keep you reaching for more. This simple yet satisfying vegan recipe requires minimal preparation and is oven-ready in just a few minutes, making it an ideal choice for busy days. Enjoy the exquisite aroma that fills your kitchen as they roast to golden perfection.
author: Vegor
steps: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
Pat dry the chickpeas with paper towels, removing excess moisture.
In a mixing bowl, combine olive oil, smoked paprika, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and pepper.
Add chickpeas to the bowl and toss until evenly coated with the spice mixture.
Spread chickpeas on a baking sheet in a single layer.
Remove from the oven and let cool before serving.

title: Salted Caramel Vegan Donuts
description: Indulge in our Salted Caramel Vegan Donuts, a divine treat that seamlessly marries the warm, buttery notes of caramel with a hint of sea salt. These donuts are crafted without any animal products, making them an ethical choice for dessert lovers. Perfectly soft and fluffy, each bite promises an enchanting experience enhanced by the luscious caramel glaze. Ideal for sharing during tea time or as a special treat for yourself, these donuts showcase a beautiful fusion of flavor and conscious eating, offering satisfaction and delight in each mouthful.
author: Vegor
steps: Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C) and lightly grease a donut pan.
In a bowl, mix flour, baking powder, and 1/2 tsp salt. Set aside.
In another bowl, blend vegan butter and sugar until smooth. Add almond milk and coconut oil, mixing well.
Gradually add dry ingredients to wet, stirring until just combined.
Pour batter into prepared donut pan, filling each about halfway.
To make the caramel glaze, combine brown sugar and water in a saucepan over medium heat. Stir until sugar dissolves, then boil for 5 minutes.
Remove from heat and stir in vanilla extract. Let cool until slightly thickened.
Dip each donut into the caramel glaze and sprinkle with sea salt.
Let the glaze set for a few minutes before enjoying.

title: Tuscan Bean & Vegetable Soup
description: This delightful Tuscan Bean & Vegetable Soup is a warm and nourishing meal, perfect for any season. Combining a rich assortment of beans with fresh seasonal vegetables, this soup embodies the flavors of Italy. Packed with nutrients, it’s not only a feast for the taste buds but also a wholesome choice for those seeking a balanced meal. The combination of tender vegetables, hearty beans, and fragrant Italian herbs offers a comforting experience, reminiscent of classic home-cooked meals. Enjoy this vegan soup as a standalone dish or with a slice of freshly baked bread, making it an ideal choice for both family dinners and casual gatherings.
author: Vegor
ingredients: 1 can (15 oz) cannellini beans, drained and rinsed
1 can (15 oz) chickpeas, drained and rinsed
steps: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add onion and garlic, sauté until onion is translucent.
Add carrot, celery, zucchini, and red bell pepper. Cook for about 5 minutes until vegetables begin to soften.
Stir in kale, cannellini beans, chickpeas, diced tomatoes, and vegetable broth.
Season with Italian seasoning, salt, and pepper.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.

title: Spiced Apple Crumble Bars with Oat Topping
description: These delightful Spiced Apple Crumble Bars are a delicious way to enjoy the flavors of fall in a vegan-friendly dessert. Each layer offers a wonderful texture, with a buttery oat base, a perfectly spiced apple filling, and a crisp, crumbly oat topping. Ingredients like cinnamon, nutmeg, and fresh apples bring warmth and comfort in every bite. They are perfect for a cozy afternoon treat or to impress guests during a holiday gathering. Easy to make, these bars are also great for preparing ahead of time, ensuring you spend less time in the kitchen and more time enjoying your creation.
author: Vegor
steps: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
In a bowl, mix flour, oats, brown sugar, baking soda, and salt.
Add melted coconut oil and stir until coarse crumbs form.
Press half the mixture into a greased 9×9 inch baking dish.
In another bowl, combine apples, cinnamon, nutmeg, vanilla, and lemon juice.
Sprinkle the remaining oat mixture over the apples.
Bake for 40-45 minutes, until golden brown.
Cool before slicing into bars. Enjoy!

title: Lemon Coconut Bliss Balls
description: These delightful Lemon Coconut Bliss Balls are a perfect fusion of zesty lemon and tropical coconut flavors, creating a refreshing and satisfying vegan treat. Packed with wholesome ingredients, these bite-sized delights offer a burst of flavor in every bite. Ideal for those seeking a tasty, guilt-free snack, these bliss balls are filled with the goodness of almonds and dates. Their natural sweetness combined with the tangy lemon zest creates an irresistible combination that’s bound to become a staple in your repertoire of healthy vegan treats. With a simple preparation process and no cooking required, these bliss balls are a convenient option for busy individuals aiming to maintain a balanced lifestyle without compromising on flavor.
author: Vegor
steps: Place all ingredients into a food processor.
Blend until well combined and mixture holds together.
Form mixture into small balls and place onto a tray.
Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to firm up.

title: Vegan Matcha Cheesecake Bites
description: Indulge in the exquisite blend of flavors and textures with these delightful Vegan Matcha Cheesecake Bites. Crafted to perfection, these bites boast a creamy matcha-infused filling that is both rich and smooth, set upon a delectable crust that crumbles delicately with every bite. The vibrant green hue not only pleases the eye but also hints at the earthy and slightly sweet notes of the matcha. These are perfect for those who appreciate a refined dessert that aligns with vegan values, promising satisfaction without compromise. Ideal for any occasion, these cheesecake bites will definitely leave a lasting impression on your taste buds and those of your guests.
author: Vegor
ingredients: 1 cup raw cashews, soaked and drained
steps: Prepare the crust by combining almond flour, melted coconut oil, and maple syrup in a bowl. Mix well.
Press the crust mixture into the bottom of lined or greased mini cupcake molds.
In a blender, combine soaked cashews, coconut cream, maple syrup, matcha powder, and vanilla extract. Blend until smooth.
Pour the matcha filling over the crust in the molds.
Freeze for at least 2 hours or until set.

title: Buffalo Chickpea Stuffed Sweet Potatoes
description: This vegan recipe is a delightful combination of spicy buffalo chickpeas and creamy sweet potatoes, creating a satisfying and flavorful meal. The roasted sweet potatoes provide a tender and slightly sweet base that pairs perfectly with the spicy and tangy chickpeas. This dish is both filling and nutritious, offering a balance of protein, fiber, and vitamins. Not only is this recipe quick and easy to prepare, but it’s also a healthy alternative to traditional buffalo dishes. Perfect for a hearty lunch or a cozy dinner, it’s bound to become a favorite in your vegan recipe repertoire.
author: Vegor
steps: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
Pierce sweet potatoes with a fork and bake for 30 minutes or until tender.
In a skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat.
Add chickpeas and cook until slightly crispy.
Stir in hot sauce, garlic powder, onion powder, and smoked paprika.
Remove sweet potatoes from the oven and let cool slightly.
Slice open and fluff the insides with a fork.
Top with buffalo chickpea mixture.
Garnish with fresh cilantro before serving.

title: Dark Chocolate and Raspberry Vegan Tart
description: Indulge in the decadent flavors of our Dark Chocolate and Raspberry Vegan Tart. This exquisite dessert features a perfectly baked buttery vegan crust, filled with rich, velvety dark chocolate ganache that simply melts in your mouth. Topped with luscious raspberries, the tart is both visually stunning and delightfully delicious. The balance of flavors is achieved through the tartness of the raspberries paired with deep, rich chocolate, creating a symphony of taste that will tantalize your taste buds. Whether you’re hosting a dinner party or treating yourself to something special, this vegan tart is the perfect sophisticated and guilt-free indulgence.
author: Vegor
steps: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
In a bowl, mix flour, almond flour, powdered sugar, and cocoa powder.
Cut in vegan butter until crumbly. Press evenly into a tart pan.
Bake crust for 15 minutes; cool completely.
Heat coconut cream until simmering.
Pour ganache into cooled crust.
Chill until set, about 2 hours.
Top with fresh raspberries before serving.

title: Jackfruit Enchiladas with Smoky Tomato Sauce
description: Dive into a plant-based culinary adventure with these Jackfruit Enchiladas. An exquisite combination of tender jackfruit enveloped in soft corn tortillas, this dish is elevated with a smoky tomato sauce, crafted meticulously with roasted tomatoes and a blend of traditional Mexican spices. Perfect for a hearty dinner, these enchiladas celebrate rich flavors and textures, making them a satisfying option for vegans and culinary enthusiasts alike. The hint of smoky aroma from the tomato sauce pairs beautifully with the savory jackfruit filling, delivering a harmonious dining experience that resonates with authenticity and delight. This recipe not only offers sumptuous taste but also aligns with dietary ethics, ensuring a guilt-free gastronomic pleasure.
author: Vegor
steps: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
Drain and rinse the jackfruit. Shred the pieces to resemble pulled meat.
In a skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add onions and garlic, sauté until golden.
Add shredded jackfruit, smoked paprika, cumin, salt, and pepper. Cook for 10 minutes.
Blend roasted tomatoes with salt and smoked paprika to create a sauce.
Fill each tortilla with the jackfruit mixture, roll them up, and place in the dish.
Pour remaining tomato sauce over the enchiladas.
Bake in the oven for 20-25 minutes.
Garnish with fresh cilantro before serving.

title: Asian Cucumber Salad with Sesame Dressing
description: This Asian Cucumber Salad with Sesame Dressing is a refreshing and vibrant dish, perfect for summer and an ideal start to any meal. The crunchy cucumber slices are tossed with a flavorful sesame dressing that balances umami, sour, and savory notes. The salad is easy to prepare and offers a delightful combination of textures and tastes. Its lightness is balanced by the rich sesame flavors, making it a versatile dish that can serve as a side or appetizer. Whether you’re hosting a dinner party or looking for a quick lunch option, this salad will make a delightful addition to your meal.
author: Vegor
steps: Thinly slice the cucumbers and place them in a salad bowl.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, rice vinegar, sesame oil, sugar, minced garlic, and a pinch of salt until well combined.
Pour the dressing over the cucumber slices and toss gently to coat them evenly.
Sprinkle sesame seeds over the salad before serving.
Serve immediately or chill in the refrigerator for 10-15 minutes to allow the flavors to meld before serving.

title: Vegan Loaded Nachos with Cashew Queso
description: Indulge in the vibrant flavors of Vegan Loaded Nachos topped with Cashew Queso, an enticing plant-based alternative that captures the essence of traditional nachos while being entirely dairy-free. This recipe transforms classic comfort food into a nutritious, vegan-friendly dish that’s perfect for sharing. A layer of crispy corn tortilla chips is generously adorned with creamy, spicy cashew queso, providing a rich and velvety sauce that satisfies your cheese cravings without compromise. The nachos are further topped with a spectrum of colorful vegetables, such as juicy tomatoes, crunchy bell peppers, zesty red onions, and fresh cilantro, enhancing the dish’s complexity and freshness. Black beans add heartiness, making these nachos a filling meal. Serve these nachos as an appetizer or snack during game night, parties, or casual gatherings, and watch them disappear in an instant, captivating vegans and non-vegans alike.
author: Vegor
steps: Soak the raw cashews in water for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Drain and rinse the soaked cashews, then place them in a blender.
Add water, nutritional yeast, lemon juice, garlic powder, onion powder, smoked paprika, and cayenne pepper into the blender.
Blend the mixture until smooth and creamy, adjusting the seasoning as needed.
Arrange the tortilla chips on a large serving platter.
Top the nachos with black beans, tomatoes, red onion, bell peppers, cilantro, and jalapeño slices.
Serve immediately and enjoy your flavorful Vegan Loaded Nachos.

title: Harissa Roasted Cauliflower Steak with Garlic Sauce
description: Experience a delightful blend of fiery spices and rich aromas with our Harissa Roasted Cauliflower Steak. This dish elevates the humble cauliflower into a star entree, infused with the bold, spicy notes of harissa paste that are perfectly balanced by a creamy and aromatic garlic sauce. The cauliflower steaks are roasted to perfection, yielding a slightly charred and crispy exterior while maintaining a tender interior. This vegan-friendly meal offers a flavorful medley that is both satisfying and nutritious, making it a delightful addition to your dining table. Enjoy each bite as the robust flavors intertwine harmoniously to provide a memorable culinary experience.
author: Vegor
steps: Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
Remove the leaves and trim the base of the cauliflower, but keep the core intact.
Slice the cauliflower into thick steaks, about 1 inch each.
Mix harissa paste with 2 tablespoons of olive oil. Brush mixture over both sides of the cauliflower steaks.
Season with salt and black pepper.
Roast in the oven for 20-25 minutes, flipping halfway through, until tender and slightly charred.
Meanwhile, prepare the garlic sauce by whisking together minced garlic, tahini, lemon juice, and remaining olive oil. Add water to thin to desired consistency.
Season the sauce with salt to taste.
Serve the cauliflower steaks hot, drizzled with garlic sauce and garnished with fresh parsley.

title: Moroccan Carrot Salad with Raisins and Spices
description: This vibrant Moroccan Carrot Salad combines sweet and spicy flavors to create a refreshing and satisfying dish. Freshly grated carrots mingle with plump raisins, harmoniously blended with a hint of cinnamon, cumin, and coriander, offering a delightful balance of sweetness and spice. A squeeze of lemon adds a burst of citrus, while fresh mint leaves bring a refreshing aroma, making it an ideal salad for both special occasions and everyday meals. Enjoy the symphony of flavors that capture the essence of Moroccan cuisine in every bite. Whether served as a starter or a side, this salad will leave a lasting impression on your taste buds.
author: Vegor
steps: Peel and grate the carrots into a large bowl.
Add the raisins to the bowl of grated carrots.
In a small bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, cumin, cinnamon, and coriander until well combined.
Pour the dressing over the carrot mixture and toss until the carrots and raisins are well coated.
Season with salt to taste.
Garnish with fresh mint leaves before serving.

title: Quinoa and Roasted Vegetable Salad with Lemon Vinaigrette
description: This Quinoa and Roasted Vegetable Salad with Lemon Vinaigrette is a vibrant and nutritious dish that combines the nutty flavor of quinoa with the colorful freshness of seasonal vegetables. Roasting the vegetables enhances their natural sweetness, creating a delicious contrast with the tangy lemon vinaigrette. This salad is perfect as a main dish or a hearty side, balancing wholesome grains with the deliciously roasted medley and a zesty dressing that enlivens the palate.
author: Vegor
steps: Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
Rinse quinoa under cold water. In a pot, bring quinoa and water to a boil. Reduce heat, cover, and let simmer for 15 minutes.
Toss bell pepper, zucchini, cherry tomatoes, and onion with olive oil, salt, and pepper. Spread on a baking sheet and roast for 20 minutes.
In a bowl, whisk together lemon juice, garlic, Dijon mustard, and a pinch of salt. Slowly drizzle in olive oil while whisking. Set aside.
Once quinoa is cooked, fluff with a fork.
Garnish with fresh parsley and serve warm or at room temperature.

title: Grilled Peach and Arugula Salad with Balsamic Glaze
description: This Grilled Peach and Arugula Salad presents a delightful contrast of flavors and textures, making it a standout dish for any occasion. Juicy, caramelized peaches are grilled to perfection, bringing out their natural sugars, which marry beautifully with the peppery arugula. Topped with a rich balsamic glaze, this salad offers a balance of sweet and tangy, enhanced by the crunchy texture of toasted nuts. Ideal for summer gatherings, this vibrant salad not only pleases the palate but also offers a visually spectacular presentation. As a nutritious, vegan-friendly option, it is a testament to how the simplest ingredients can be transformed into an extraordinary culinary experience.
author: Vegor
steps: Preheat grill to medium-high heat.
Slice peaches in half and remove pits.
Brush peaches with olive oil and grill for 3-4 minutes per side until caramelized.
Arrange arugula on a serving platter.
Top with grilled peaches.
Sprinkle with toasted almonds, salt, and pepper.

title: Sweet Potato and Kale Salad with Tahini Dressing
description: This Sweet Potato and Kale Salad is a delicious and nourishing option for those following a vegan lifestyle. The sweet potatoes are roasted to perfection, bringing out their natural sweetness, while the kale provides a slight bitterness that balances the overall taste. Tossed in a creamy tahini dressing that adds a rich, nutty flavor, this salad is both satisfying and full of vibrant colors. Topped with crunchy roasted seeds, it offers a delightful texture contrast. Perfect for a healthy lunch or a light dinner, this recipe is a wonderful way to enjoy seasonal produce.
author: Vegor
ingredients: 2 medium sweet potatoes, peeled and cubed
1 bunch kale, stemmed and torn into pieces
steps: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
Toss sweet potatoes with 1 tbsp olive oil, salt, and pepper. Spread on a baking sheet.
Roast sweet potatoes for 25-30 minutes until tender.
In a large bowl, massage kale with 1 tbsp olive oil and a pinch of salt until softened.
In a small bowl, whisk together tahini, lemon juice, water, garlic, and remaining olive oil.
Drizzle tahini dressing over the salad and toss to combine.
Top with roasted seeds before serving.

title: Creamy Mushroom and Barley Soup
description: Embrace the comforting flavors of this Creamy Mushroom and Barley Soup, a delightful vegan dish perfect for any season. The earthy mushrooms blend seamlessly with tender barley grains, creating a satisfying and velvety texture. Each spoonful is rich in umami flavors, enhanced by aromatic herbs and a hint of garlic. This soup not only provides essential nutrients but also offers a wholesome and hearty meal that will warm you from the inside out. Ideal for lunch or dinner, this soup is a testament to the beauty of plant-based cooking, showcasing vibrant flavors and a variety of textures in every bite.
author: Vegor
steps: Rinse barley under cold water and set aside.
Heat olive oil in a pot over medium heat.
Add garlic and onion, sauté until translucent.
Stir in carrots and celery, cook for 5 minutes.
Add mushrooms and thyme, cook until mushrooms release juices.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes.
Stir in almond milk, season with salt and pepper.
Simmer for another 5 minutes, adjust seasoning if necessary.
Serve hot.

title: Creamy Zucchini and Basil Soup
description: This delightful Creamy Zucchini and Basil Soup offers both the freshness of summer flavors and the comfort of a soothing soup. A harmonious blend of tender zucchinis, aromatic fresh basil, and creamy coconut milk creates a rich and satisfying dish perfect for any occasion. The natural sweetness of the zucchini beautifully complements the herbal notes of the basil, while coconut milk adds a luscious texture without any dairy. Ideal for a quick weeknight meal or an elegant appetizer for a dinner party, this soup is as versatile as it is delicious, ensuring a crowd-pleasing experience with every spoonful.
author: Vegor
steps: In a large pot, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add onion and garlic, sauté until translucent.
Add sliced zucchinis and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Pour in vegetable broth and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes until zucchinis are tender.
Stir in coconut milk and basil leaves. Blend the soup using an immersion blender until smooth.
Season with salt and pepper to taste. Serve hot and garnish with extra basil leaves if desired.

title: Vegan Corn Chowder with Smoked Paprika
description: This Vegan Corn Chowder with Smoked Paprika is an exquisite medley of flavors, drawing from fresh, seasonal produce and authentic spices to create a comforting and nourishing dish. The creamy texture is achieved using plant-based ingredients, making it a guilt-free indulgence suitable for all dietary preferences. Each bite offers the natural sweetness of corn, subtly enhanced by the smoky undertones of paprika, providing a depth of flavor that is both sophisticated and hearty. Perfect for a cozy night in or an elegant starter for a larger meal, this chowder’s delightful balance of ingredients makes it a staple recipe for any occasion. Whether you’re looking to expand your vegan repertoire or simply enjoy a nutritious meal, this chowder delivers on all fronts, ensuring satisfaction with every spoonful.
author: Vegor
steps: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add onion and garlic, sauté until translucent.
Add red bell pepper and corn kernels. Cook for about 5 minutes.
Pour in vegetable broth and almond milk, bring to a gentle boil.
Reduce heat and stir in smoked paprika, salt, and pepper.
Simmer for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh chives.

title: Smoky Vegan Carrot Lox Bagels
description: Smoky Vegan Carrot Lox Bagels offer a delightful alternative to traditional lox, capturing the essence of the sea with versatile carrots. Marinated in a mix of liquid smoke, soy sauce, and seasonings, the carrots imitate the flavor and texture of smoked salmon, making them a perfect topping for bagels. This vegan version is not only healthier but also caters to a broader range of dietary preferences, ensuring everyone can enjoy the brunch classic without compromise.
author: Vegor
steps: Peel carrots into thin strips using a vegetable peeler.
In a large bowl, mix soy sauce, liquid smoke, olive oil, apple cider vinegar, garlic powder, and smoked paprika.
Add carrot strips and toss to coat. Let marinate for at least 1 hour.
Preheat oven to 300°F (150°C).
Arrange marinated carrot strips on a baking sheet.
Let cool slightly, then refrigerate until ready to use.
Slice bagels and spread with vegan cream cheese.
Top with carrot lox, capers, and dill. Serve and enjoy.

title: Pumpkin Spice Overnight Oats with Pecans
description: This delightful vegan recipe for Pumpkin Spice Overnight Oats with Pecans is a perfect fall breakfast treat, combining the warm flavors of pumpkin spice with the satisfying crunch of pecans. Rich in both flavor and nutrients, these oats offer a creamy base infused with almond milk and pureed pumpkin, sweetened naturally with maple syrup. Precious spices such as cinnamon and nutmeg elevate this dish to autumnal perfection. Simple to prepare, these oats offer a convenient and nutritious start to your day, making them ideal for busy mornings and meal prep enthusiasts.
author: Vegor
steps: In a medium-sized bowl, combine oats, almond milk, pumpkin puree, maple syrup, and pumpkin spice.
Stir until well combined.
Divide the mixture into two jars or bowls.
Top with chopped pecans.
Cover and refrigerate overnight.

title: Creamy Vegan Coconut Chia Pudding
description: Dive into the tropical delight of Creamy Vegan Coconut Chia Pudding, a nutritious and delicious treat perfect for any occasion. This pudding combines the natural sweetness of coconut milk with the rich texture of chia seeds to create a satisfying dessert that’s both creamy and wholesome. With its simple ingredients and no-cook preparation, it’s incredibly easy to make and customize. Whether enjoyed as a breakfast, snack, or dessert, this chia pudding is packed with fiber, omega-3s, and antioxidants, making it as healthy as it is tasty. Garnish with fresh fruits or a sprinkle of coconut flakes for an added touch of flavor and texture.
author: Vegor
steps: In a bowl, whisk together coconut milk, maple syrup, vanilla extract, and salt until well combined.
Add chia seeds and whisk again to distribute evenly.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 4 hours or overnight to thicken.
Stir the pudding before serving to ensure even consistency.
Serve chilled topped with fruits or coconut flakes.

title: Spicy Vegan Kimchi Fried Rice
description: This Spicy Vegan Kimchi Fried Rice is a delightful fusion of robust flavors and plant-based ingredients. Combining the fiery zest of kimchi with perfectly cooked rice, this dish offers a delicious and nutritious meal. The inclusion of tofu and a medley of seasonal vegetables adds an extra layer of texture and taste, capturing the heart of Asian cuisine while ensuring a satisfying vegan experience. Perfect for a quick dinner or lunch, this recipe is both fulfilling and brings a spicy kick to your culinary repertoire.
author: Vegor
ingredients: 1 cup chopped vegetables (such as carrots, peas, and bell peppers)
steps: Heat sesame oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add chopped kimchi and cook for 3-4 minutes until it starts to caramelize.
Add the tofu cubes and cook until golden brown.
Stir in the gochugaru, soy sauce, and kimchi juice. Mix well.
Add the chopped vegetables and cook for another 5 minutes until they are tender.
Garnish with sliced green onions and sesame seeds before serving.

title: Sweet Vegan Cinnamon Apple Crumble
description: This delightful Sweet Vegan Cinnamon Apple Crumble is a heartwarming dessert that perfectly balances the natural sweetness of apples with a crunchy, flavorful crumble topping. Combining juicy, tender apples spiced with cinnamon, this dish brings the essence of fall into your home. A mixture of oats, nuts, and a hint of brown sugar creates a crisp topping that complements the softness of the fruit below. Ideal for any occasion, this vegan dessert will impress even the most discerning of palettes. Not only delicious, but it is also entirely plant-based, making it suitable for vegan diets while still delivering comfort and satisfaction with every bite.
author: Vegor
steps: Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C).
In a large bowl, toss the sliced apples with lemon juice and cinnamon.
Spread the apples evenly in a baking dish.
In another bowl, combine oats, almond flour, chopped walnuts, brown sugar, and salt.
Add melted coconut oil to the dry mixture and mix until crumbly.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the topping is golden brown and the apples are tender.
Let cool slightly before serving.

title: Creamy Vegan Mushroom and Leek Pie
description: This Creamy Vegan Mushroom and Leek Pie is a delightful, plant-based take on a classic savory pie. It combines the earthy flavors of mushrooms and the subtle sweetness of leeks, enveloped in a rich, creamy sauce that is completely dairy-free. Wrapped in a flaky pastry crust, this pie offers a satisfying and hearty meal ideal for any dinner setting. It’s seasoned with aromatic herbs that enhance the natural umami of the mushrooms, making it a truly comforting dish. Perfect for a family gathering or a weeknight dinner, it caters to both vegans and non-vegans alike.
author: Vegor
steps: Preheat oven to 200°C (390°F).
Roll out puff pastry and line a pie dish.
In a pan, heat olive oil and sauté garlic and leeks until soft.
Add mushrooms and cook until golden brown.
In a bowl, mix almond milk and cornstarch until smooth.
Season with thyme, salt, and pepper.
Pour filling into pastry-lined dish and cover with another pastry layer.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the top is golden brown.
Let cool slightly before serving.

title: Herb-Crusted Vegan Lentil Loaf
description: This exquisite Herb-Crusted Vegan Lentil Loaf is an ideal centerpiece for any plant-based meal. It is crafted with a blend of hearty lentils, fresh herbs, and aromatic spices, creating a deeply satisfying and flavorful experience. This dish showcases a delightful contrast of a crunchy herb crust with a tender and savory interior. It’s drenched in a tangy tomato glaze that elevates the simple ingredients into an enticing gourmet experience. Perfect for a cozy family dinner or a sophisticated dinner party, this lentil loaf is as nutritious as it is delicious, providing a fulfilling, satisfying option that doesn’t compromise on flavor.
author: Vegor
ingredients: 1/4 cup chopped fresh herbs (thyme, rosemary, parsley)
Tomato glaze: 1/4 cup ketchup, 1 tablespoon maple syrup, 1 tablespoon balsamic vinegar
steps: Rinse lentils under cold water. In a saucepan, combine lentils and vegetable broth. Bring to a boil, then reduce to a simmer. Cook until lentils are tender, about 20 minutes.
Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
In a large bowl, combine cooked lentils, onion, garlic, breadcrumbs, ground flaxseed, tomato paste, soy sauce, smoked paprika, olive oil, and herbs. Mix well. Season with salt and pepper.
Transfer mix to a greased loaf pan, pressing down firmly.
In a small bowl, mix ketchup, maple syrup, and balsamic vinegar. Spread this glaze over the top of the loaf.
Allow to cool before slicing. Serve warm.

title: Vegan Loaded Sweet Potato Nachos
description: Vegan Loaded Sweet Potato Nachos are a delightful twist on the classic nacho dish, offering a healthy yet indulgent option for snack lovers. This recipe combines crispy sweet potato rounds as the base, topped generously with a vibrant array of fresh vegetables, creamy avocado, and a tangy vegan cheese sauce. Perfect for gatherings or a solo indulgence, these nachos cater to a variety of tastes, bringing together savory, tangy, and slightly sweet flavors in each satisfying bite. Whether you’re a committed vegan or simply exploring new flavors, these nachos promise to be both a tasty and nutritious choice.
author: Vegor
ingredients: 2 large sweet potatoes, sliced into rounds
1 cup black beans, rinsed and drained
steps: Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C).
Arrange the sweet potato slices on a baking sheet, drizzle with olive oil, and sprinkle with smoked paprika, salt, and pepper.
Bake for 20-25 minutes until crispy and golden brown.
While the sweet potatoes bake, prepare the toppings.
In a bowl, combine diced avocado, red onion, jalapeño, cilantro, and lime juice. Season with salt and pepper.
Top with black beans, prepared avocado mixture, and drizzle generously with vegan cheese sauce.
Serve immediately, garnished with extra cilantro if desired.

title: Cranberry Orange Vegan Scones
description: These Cranberry Orange Vegan Scones are a delightful treat, perfect for any occasion. With a flavorful blend of tart cranberries and vibrant orange zest, these scones offer a burst of freshness in every bite. They’re adorned with a light, golden crust and a tender, moist interior. Crafted without dairy or eggs, they retain the classic scone quality while catering to a vegan diet. Serve these scones warm for breakfast or as an afternoon snack, where they are sure to impress with their bright flavors and wholesome texture.
author: Vegor
steps: Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C) and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
Cut the cold vegan butter into the dry mixture until it resembles coarse crumbs.
Stir in dried cranberries and orange zest.
In a separate bowl, mix almond milk and vanilla extract.
Turn dough onto a floured surface and knead gently.
Form into a disc and cut into 8 wedges.
Place the wedges on the prepared baking sheet.
Bake for 20 minutes or until golden brown.

title: Vegan Enchilada Casserole
description: This Vegan Enchilada Casserole is a delightful fusion of traditional Mexican flavors with a plant-based twist. Layers of corn tortillas are lovingly smothered in a rich, spicy enchilada sauce, interspersed with a hearty, seasoned mixture of black beans, corn, and bell peppers. Topped with a generous sprinkle of dairy-free cheese, this casserole is baked until golden and bubbling for the perfect weeknight dinner. Each bite offers a vibrant explosion of taste that is sure to satisfy both vegans and non-vegans alike, while remaining wholesome and health-conscious.
author: Vegor
steps: Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
In a skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic, sauté until translucent.
Stir in black beans, corn, and diced bell peppers.
Season with chili powder, cumin, salt, and pepper.
Add a layer of corn tortillas.
Spread a portion of the bean mixture over the tortillas.
Repeat layers, ending with enchilada sauce.
Top with dairy-free cheese.

title: Vegan Butter Tofu with Basmati Rice
description: This Vegan Butter Tofu with Basmati Rice is a deliciously creamy and aromatic dish inspired by Indian cuisine. Made with tofu instead of the traditional paneer, this vegan version ensures you enjoy all the rich flavors without any dairy. The tofu is marinated and cooked until golden brown, then simmered in a luscious sauce made with coconut milk, tomatoes, and a blend of spices including garam masala and turmeric. It’s served over fragrant basmati rice, making it a perfect comfort meal that’s nutritious and satisfying. This dish is ideal for anyone looking to enjoy a plant-based take on a classic Indian dish with vibrant, bold flavors.
author: Vegor
steps: Press tofu to remove excess moisture, then cut into cubes.
Heat 1 tbsp coconut oil in a pan, add tofu cubes, and cook until golden brown. Set aside.
In the same pan, add remaining oil and sauté onions and garlic until fragrant.
Stir in garam masala and turmeric, cooking for 1 minute.
Add diced tomatoes and coconut milk, stir well and let simmer for 5 minutes.
Meanwhile, cook basmati rice according to package instructions.
Serve the tofu curry over a bed of basmati rice, garnished with fresh cilantro.

title: Smoky Vegan Cauliflower Mac and Cheese
description: Indulge in this creamy, smoky vegan cauliflower mac and cheese that offers a delectable alternative to the traditional dish. The rich sauce marries perfectly with tender cauliflower and pasta, creating an unforgettable taste sensation. With its smoky flavor profile, this dish stands out by incorporating smoked paprika and nutritional yeast, offering a well-rounded umami flavor that doesn’t compromise on taste or texture. This dish is not only delicious but also health-conscious, providing a nutrient-rich meal that appeals to both vegan and non-vegan palates alike. A perfect dinner choice for those looking to enjoy comfort food while maintaining a healthy lifestyle.
author: Vegor
steps: Preheat your oven to 400°F (200°C).
Boil cauliflower and pasta in separate pots until tender.
Blend cashews, almond milk, nutritional yeast, smoked paprika, olive oil, and lemon juice until smooth.
Mix cauliflower and pasta in a baking dish, pour sauce over and combine well.
Bake for 15 minutes until golden on top.

title: Ginger Miso Vegan Glazed Eggplant
description: Experience a delightful fusion of flavors with our Ginger Miso Vegan Glazed Eggplant recipe. This dish beautifully marries the sweet, savory, and umami notes characteristic of Asian cuisine. Tender eggplant slices are generously glazed with a rich sauce made from miso paste, fresh ginger, and a touch of maple syrup, resulting in a lusciously sticky coating. Perfect for those seeking a plant-based option full of depth and character, this recipe is not only full of flavor but is also visually appealing, making it a showstopper at any dinner gathering.
author: Vegor
steps: Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
Slice the eggplants into 1-inch thick rounds.
In a bowl, mix miso paste, maple syrup, soy sauce, ginger, rice vinegar, and garlic.
Brush the eggplant rounds with sesame oil and place them on a baking sheet.
Roast for 15 minutes, turning halfway through.
Return to oven and bake for an additional 10 minutes until caramelized.
Garnish with chopped scallions and sesame seeds before serving.

title: Vegan Mediterranean Couscous Salad
description: This Vegan Mediterranean Couscous Salad is a vibrant and refreshing dish that combines the wholesome flavors of the Mediterranean with a plant-based twist. The couscous serves as a perfect base, providing a light and fluffy texture that absorbs the aromatic dressing beautifully. This salad features an array of colorful vegetables, including cherry tomatoes, cucumbers, and bell peppers, which add freshness and crunch. The use of kalamata olives and capers infuses the dish with a distinct briny taste, perfectly complemented by the nuttiness of the pine nuts. Fresh herbs like parsley and mint further elevate the salad with their fragrant and lively notes. This salad is not only visually appealing but also packed with nutrients and flavors, making it a perfect choice for a light lunch or as a side dish for dinner. Whether you’re hosting a summer gathering or looking for a healthy and satisfying meal, this Vegan Mediterranean Couscous Salad is sure to impress.
author: Vegor
ingredients: 1/4 cup kalamata olives, pitted and sliced
steps: Bring 1 cup of water to a boil and pour over the couscous in a heat-proof bowl. Cover and let sit for 5 minutes, then fluff with a fork.
In a large salad bowl, combine the couscous, cherry tomatoes, cucumber, bell pepper, olives, capers, pine nuts, parsley, and mint.
In a small bowl, whisk together the olive oil, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Pour the dressing over the salad and toss well to combine.
Serve chilled or at room temperature.

title: Vegan Moroccan Vegetable Tagine
description: Vegan Moroccan Vegetable Tagine is a delightful and aromatic dish that showcases the rich culinary tradition of Morocco. This tagine is a harmonious blend of colorful vegetables and spices, cooked slowly to bring out deep flavors. The combination of ingredients like zucchini, carrots, and chickpeas, along with the warm spices of cumin and coriander, create a dish that is both hearty and comforting. The inclusion of dried apricots adds a subtle sweetness that perfectly balances the savory elements, making it a satisfying meal that’s both nutritious and full of character. Perfect for a family dinner or a festive gathering, this tagine delivers complex flavors in a simple, vegan-friendly way.
author: Vegor
steps: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add onion and garlic, sauté until softened.
Add carrots and zucchini, cook for 5 minutes.
Stir in chickpeas and apricots, cook for another 5 minutes.
Add cumin, coriander, cinnamon, salt, and pepper, stir to coat vegetables.
Pour in vegetable broth, bring to a boil. Reduce heat and cover, simmer for 30 minutes.
Garnish with fresh cilantro before serving.

title: Creamy Vegan Tomato Basil Bisque
description: This Creamy Vegan Tomato Basil Bisque is a delightful blend of ripe tomatoes and fresh basil, creating a silky smooth soup that’s both comforting and refreshing. It’s perfect for any season and offers a velvety texture enhanced by the creaminess of coconut milk, making it indulgent yet light. The bisque is aromatic with garlic and onions, and the addition of nutritional yeast gives it a subtle cheesy flavor without any dairy. Serve it with crusty bread for a complete meal.
author: Vegor
steps: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add chopped onion and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and continue to sauté for another 2 minutes.
Stir in the chopped tomatoes and vegetable broth. Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat and let it simmer for 20 minutes.
Stir in coconut milk, fresh basil, and nutritional yeast.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with additional basil if desired.

title: Roasted Red Pepper and Almond Vegan Dip
description: This vibrant Roasted Red Pepper and Almond Vegan Dip blends roasted red peppers with almonds to create a deliciously creamy and flavorful spread. The natural sweetness of the peppers, combined with the nutty richness of almonds, results in an exquisite, well-rounded dip. Its smooth texture and bold flavors make it perfect as a charming appetizer for any occasion. Best served with fresh bread, vegetable sticks, or as a spread on sandwiches, this vegan dip is a crowd-pleaser that offers a delightful taste experience.
author: Vegor
steps: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
Place the almonds on a baking sheet and roast for about 10 minutes until golden brown, stirring halfway.
Add roasted red peppers, roasted almonds, olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, and smoked paprika to a blender.
Blend until smooth, scraping down sides as needed, season with salt to taste.
Transfer the dip to a bowl and garnish with a drizzle of olive oil before serving.

title: Vegan Spinach and Ricotta Stuffed Mushrooms
description: These Vegan Spinach and Ricotta Stuffed Mushrooms marry the earthy flavors of fresh mushrooms with a creamy, herb-infused vegan ricotta that is both delightful and nourishing. The dish is a symphony of textures and tastes — the tender mushrooms provide a perfect base for the rich, savory filling, which bursts with the vibrant taste of spinach and the creaminess of plant-based ricotta. Ideal for any occasion, these stuffed mushrooms make an elegant appetizer that is deceptively easy to prepare, offering both culinary satisfaction and a health-conscious choice for your next gathering. Impress your guests with this delectable vegan treat that is both wholesome and indulgent, a testament to the versatility of plant-based dining.
author: Vegor
steps: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
Clean mushrooms and remove stems.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
Add spinach and cook until wilted.
Stuff mushrooms with the mixture.
Place mushrooms on a baking sheet.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until mushrooms are tender.
Serve warm.

title: Vegan Pumpkin Alfredo with Sage
description: This exquisite Vegan Pumpkin Alfredo with Sage is a delightful fusion of creamy textures and rich flavors, presenting a culinary masterpiece that embraces the essence of autumn. The velvety pumpkin sauce, infused with aromatic sage, creates a harmonious balance, making it both nourishing and satisfying. With a careful selection of plant-based ingredients, this dish offers a savory experience that caters to those seeking a delectable vegan meal. Each bite is a testament to the enchanting blend of pumpkin’s natural sweetness and the earthy tones of sage, promising an unforgettable dining experience.
author: Vegor
steps: Cook fettuccine according to package instructions.
In a blender, combine pumpkin puree, almond milk, garlic, nutritional yeast, olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Blend until smooth and creamy.
Heat the sauce in a saucepan over medium heat for 5 minutes.
Drain pasta and toss with pumpkin alfredo sauce.

title: Coconut Lime Vegan Rice Pudding
description: This Coconut Lime Vegan Rice Pudding offers a delightful fusion of tropical flavors and creamy textures, sure to excite your taste buds. It’s made with rich coconut milk and tangy lime zest, creating a vibrant and refreshing dessert that captures the essence of island-inspired cuisine. Perfect for any occasion, this pudding not only satisfies your sweet tooth but also provides a healthy alternative to traditional rice desserts, as it’s entirely plant-based and free from dairy products.
author: Vegor
steps: Rinse the jasmine rice under cold water until the water runs clear.
In a medium saucepan, combine the coconut milk, water, coconut sugar, lime zest, lime juice, vanilla extract, and a pinch of salt.
Bring the mixture to a gentle boil over medium heat, stirring occasionally to dissolve the sugar.
Add the rinsed rice to the saucepan and stir well.

Reduce the heat to low and cover the saucepan. Allow the rice pudding to simmer gently for about 25-30 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking, until the rice is tender and the mixture is creamy.

title: Spicy Vegan Lentil Sloppy Joes
description: Experience a delightful twist on a classic comfort food with our Spicy Vegan Lentil Sloppy Joes. This dish replaces traditional meat with hearty lentils, seasoned with a blend of spices to pack an irresistible punch of flavor. The rich, tangy sauce melds perfectly with the texture of the lentils, creating a satisfying meal that’s both nutritious and delicious. Ideal for any weeknight dinner, these Sloppy Joes are not only easy to make but also wonderfully versatile. Pair them with a fresh salad or some oven-baked fries for a complete, enjoyable vegan meal that will win over family and friends alike. Enjoy a filling dish that embodies the balance of spice and savories, making it a favorite for both vegans and non-vegans.
author: Vegor
ingredients: 1 cup dried green lentils, rinsed and drained
steps: Place the lentils and water in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until lentils are tender, about 20 minutes.
While the lentils cook, heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Sauté the onion and bell pepper until soft, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic, chili powder, smoked paprika, cumin, and cayenne pepper to the skillet. Stir to combine and cook for 1 minute.
Mix in the tomato paste, tomato sauce, apple cider vinegar, and brown sugar. Season with salt and pepper, then simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
Drain any excess water from the cooked lentils and add them to the skillet. Stir well to coat the lentils with the sauce.

title: No-Bake Vegan Chocolate Peanut Butter Bars
description: These No-Bake Vegan Chocolate Peanut Butter Bars are a delightful treat that combines creamy peanut butter and rich chocolate in a soft, chewy bar. Perfect for those who crave a sweet dessert without the fuss of baking, these bars are a crowd-pleasing favorite. The bars are layered with a smooth, luscious peanut butter base topped with a decadent chocolate layer, creating a harmonious blend of flavors and textures. Ideal for vegans and non-vegans alike, these bars are an effortless way to indulge in a sweet tooth moment with minimum effort.
author: Vegor
steps: Line an 8×8 inch baking dish with parchment paper.
In a large bowl, combine peanut butter, maple syrup, coconut oil, and vanilla extract.
Stir in rolled oats until well mixed.
Press the mixture firmly into the prepared baking dish to form an even layer.
Melt the chocolate chips over a double boiler or in the microwave.
Refrigerate for at least 2 hours until set.
Cut into bars and serve chilled.

title: Vegan Chickpea Caesar Salad
description: This Vegan Chickpea Caesar Salad is a modern twist on the classic Caesar, tailored perfectly for those following a plant-based diet. With protein-packed chickpeas at the forefront, this salad not only boasts a delightful crunch but also a burst of flavors with a creamy and tangy vegan dressing. It’s a wholesome dish that marries nutritional richness with palate-pleasing tastes, making it an ideal choice for both casual meals and more sophisticated gatherings. The combination of crisp Romaine lettuce, roasted chickpeas, and a nutty, savory dressing creates a truly unforgettable culinary experience.
author: Vegor
ingredients: 1 large head of Romaine lettuce, chopped
steps: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
Toss chickpeas with olive oil, garlic powder, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper.
Spread chickpeas on a baking sheet and roast for 20 minutes or until crispy.
In a large bowl, combine chopped Romaine lettuce and roasted chickpeas.
In a separate bowl, whisk together nutritional yeast, vegan mayonnaise, lemon juice, Dijon mustard, and minced garlic to make the dressing.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional nutritional yeast if desired.

title: Maple Roasted Vegan Sweet Potato Tacos
description: These Maple Roasted Vegan Sweet Potato Tacos offer a delightful fusion of flavors that tantalize the taste buds. The sweet potatoes are roasted to perfection with a hint of maple, creating a caramelized exterior with a tender interior. These tacos are complemented by a blend of spices, providing a perfectly balanced flavor profile. A fresh, crunchy slaw and a dollop of creamy avocado topping add layers of texture and freshness to each bite. Ideal for a quick dinner or a casual gathering, these tacos will impress both vegans and non-vegans alike.
author: Vegor
steps: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
Peel and dice sweet potatoes into 1-inch cubes.
In a bowl, toss sweet potatoes with maple syrup, olive oil, cumin, chili powder, and salt.
Spread sweet potatoes on a baking sheet and roast for 25-30 minutes until tender and caramelized.
While sweet potatoes roast, prepare the slaw by combining shredded cabbage with lime juice and a pinch of salt.
Fill tortillas with roasted sweet potatoes and top with cabbage slaw.
Serve immediately and enjoy.

title: Vegan Buffalo Chickpea Salad Wraps
description: These Vegan Buffalo Chickpea Salad Wraps are a delightful fusion of flavors, bringing together the zesty taste of buffalo sauce with the wholesome goodness of chickpeas. Packed with protein and fiber, this dish makes for a perfect lunch or light dinner that satisfies the palate while remaining entirely plant-based. The creamy avocado and crunchy vegetables provide texture and freshness, balanced by the spicy kick of the buffalo sauce. An excellent choice for those looking for a nutritious and filling meal that doesn’t compromise on taste.
author: Vegor
steps: In a bowl, mash chickpeas until slightly chunky.
Mix in buffalo sauce and dairy-free ranch dressing.
Lay out wraps and distribute the chickpea mixture evenly.
Top with sliced avocado, shredded lettuce, and grated carrots.
Roll up the wraps tightly, cut in half, and serve immediately.

title: Teriyaki Glazed Vegan Meatballs
description: These Teriyaki Glazed Vegan Meatballs are a delightful combination of texture and flavor, crafted with care to satisfy both vegans and non-vegans alike. Made with a rich blend of plant-based ingredients, these meatballs boast a tender, juicy interior while being enveloped in a perfectly balanced, sweet, and savory teriyaki glaze. The flavor profile is further enhanced by the addition of traditional Japanese seasonings, delivering a complex taste experience that is both comforting and exotic. Ideal for a cozy dinner or as an impressive appetizer at gatherings, these meatballs are an embodiment of culinary creativity and plant-based goodness.
author: Vegor
steps: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C) and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a food processor, blend chickpeas until coarsely ground.
In a large bowl, combine ground chickpeas, cooked quinoa, breadcrumbs, soy sauce, ginger, garlic, and scallions.
Shape mixture into small balls and place on the prepared baking sheet.
Bake for 20 minutes, until firm and lightly browned.
Lower heat and add teriyaki sauce, ensuring meatballs are well coated.
Serve hot, garnished with extra scallions if desired.

title: Sweet and Sour Vegan Tofu Stir-Fry
description: This Sweet and Sour Vegan Tofu Stir-Fry is a delightful blend of crispy tofu, vibrant vegetables, and a tangy sweet and sour sauce that is sure to tantalize your taste buds. The tofu is marinated and fried to achieve the perfect texture, while the vegetables add a crunchy freshness that complements the rich flavors of the sauce. This dish is not only visually appealing but also packed with nutrients, making it a healthy and satisfying meal option. Ideal for both weeknight dinners and special occasions, this vegan stir-fry brings a touch of Asian-inspired elegance to your table.
author: Vegor
ingredients: 1 tbsp cornstarch mixed with 2 tbsp water
steps: Press the tofu to remove excess water; cut into cubes.
Marinate tofu in soy sauce, then toss in cornstarch.
Heat oil in a pan and fry tofu until golden and crispy. Remove and set aside.
In the same pan, stir-fry bell peppers and carrot until tender-crisp.
Add pineapple chunks to the pan and stir well.
Pour sauce into the pan, stir, and cook until thickened.
Return the tofu to the pan, toss to coat with the sauce, and heat through.
Serve hot with rice or noodles.

title: Crispy Baked Vegan Zucchini Fries
description: Indulge in the crispy delight of baked zucchini fries, seasoned perfectly to satisfy your snack cravings. These vegan zucchini fries capture the essence of healthy eating without compromising on taste, proving that nutritious can be delicious. Each fry is coated with a seasoned, crunchy exterior that provides a delightful contrast to the tender zucchini inside. Perfect as a standalone snack or an appetizer, these fries are baked to golden perfection, ensuring a guilt-free savory treat. Whether for a light lunch or a party snack, these zucchini fries are bound to become a favorite.
author: Vegor
steps: Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Cut zucchinis into fries, around 3 inches long and 1/2 inch thick.
In a bowl, mix breadcrumbs, nutritional yeast, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and black pepper.
Dip each zucchini fry into almond milk, then coat it with the breadcrumb mixture.
Place coated zucchini fries on the prepared baking sheet in a single layer.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.

title: Roasted Garlic and Herb Vegan Focaccia
description: This Roasted Garlic and Herb Vegan Focaccia is a delightful take on the classic Italian bread, combining the rich flavors of roasted garlic with a medley of fresh herbs to create an aromatic and delectable experience. The focaccia is perfectly baked to a golden brown crust with a soft and airy interior. The roasting process enhances the garlic’s natural sweetness, while the herbs infuse the bread with earthy notes. Perfect for any occasion, this vegan focaccia is not only a delightful appetizer but also a wonderful accompaniment to soups and salads. Its simplicity and bold flavors make it a favorite for both vegans and non-vegans alike.
author: Vegor
steps: Preheat oven to 220°C (428°F).
In a bowl, mix flour, salt, and yeast.
Add warm water and mix to form a dough.
Knead for 10 minutes until smooth.
Cover and let rise for 1 hour.
Press roasted garlic into dough.
Drizzle with olive oil.
Sprinkle rosemary and thyme over the surface.
Add a touch of sea salt.

title: Creamy Avocado Vegan Pesto Pasta
description: This Creamy Avocado Vegan Pesto Pasta is a delectable twist on the traditional pesto dish. Using ripe avocados imparts a luscious texture and rich flavor profile. Blended with fresh basil, garlic, nuts, and lemon juice, the avocado provides a creamy base that’s both vibrant and satisfying. This dish is not only a feast for the taste buds but also a visual delight, with the bright green sauce beautifully coating the pasta. Perfect for a quick dinner, it offers a healthy dose of nutrients while remaining entirely vegan, dairy-free, and utterly enticing.
author: Vegor
steps: Cook the pasta according to package instructions.
In a blender, combine avocados, basil, garlic, pine nuts, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Blend until smooth, gradually adding olive oil until the desired consistency is reached.
Toss the cooked pasta with the avocado pesto until well coated.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional basil if desired.

title: Baked Falafel with Tahini Sauce
description: Falafel, a beloved Middle Eastern dish, is transformed into a healthy baked version that retains all the delicious flavors without the added oil from frying. Packed with protein-rich chickpeas, aromatic spices, and fresh herbs, these falafels are crispy on the outside yet soft and moist on the inside. Perfectly paired with a creamy, tangy tahini sauce, this dish is not only satisfying but also nutritious, making it suitable for everyday meals or special gatherings. Serve with warm pita, salads, or as a standalone snack.
author: Vegor
steps: Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.

In a food processor, combine the chickpeas, onion, garlic, parsley, cilantro, cumin, coriander, baking powder, and salt. Pulse until the mixture is coarsely blended, scraping down the sides as needed.
Using your hands, form the mixture into small balls or patties and place them on the prepared baking sheet. Brush or spray the tops with olive oil and sprinkle with sesame seeds.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown and crisp, turning halfway through.
While the falafel is baking, prepare the tahini sauce. In a small bowl, combine the tahini, lemon juice, water, minced garlic, and salt; whisk until smooth.

title: Harvest Quinoa Salad
description: In this delectable dish, Brussels sprouts are first halved and then roasted to golden perfection, allowing their natural nutty flavors to be enhanced through caramelization. The crowning touch is a silky balsamic glaze, which imparts a sweet and tangy depth, turning these humble vegetables into an irresistible culinary delight. Ideal for elevating any meal, this vegan recipe effortlessly combines simplicity and sophistication, making it a staple for both casual dinners and festive gatherings.
author: Vegor
steps: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
Trim and halve the Brussels sprouts.
Toss them with olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Spread evenly on a baking sheet.
Roast for 25-30 minutes until golden brown.
Simmer until slightly thickened, about 5 minutes.
Drizzle the glaze over the roasted Brussels sprouts before serving.

title: Vegan Pad See Ew
description: Vegan Pad See Ew is a savory Thai-inspired stir-fry dish traditionally made with wide rice noodles, fresh crunchy vegetables, and a rich, umami sauce. This plant-based version features robust flavors and satisfying textures, presenting an ideal meal for those looking to indulge in the essence of authentic Asian cuisine without animal products. The key to this recipe lies in balancing the salty, sweet, and slightly spicy fusion of soy sauce, garlic, and chili. Served hot, this wholesome dish offers a delightful dining experience for vegans and non-vegans alike, embodying the perfect combination of nutritional benefits and palatable flavors.
author: Vegor
steps: Cook rice noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
In a small bowl, mix soy sauce, dark soy sauce, and chili sauce. Set aside.
Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat. Add garlic and stir-fry until fragrant.
Add broccoli and carrots to the pan, stir-frying for 3-4 minutes.
Add tofu to the pan and cook for an additional 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir-fry everything together for another 2-3 minutes until noodles absorb the sauce and vegetables are tender crisp.
Serve immediately and enjoy your Vegan Pad See Ew.

title: Sweet and Sour Tofu
description: Sweet and Sour Tofu is a delightful culinary creation that combines the tangy flavors of a classic sweet and sour sauce with the wholesome goodness of tofu. This vegan dish is a harmonious blend of crispy tofu cubes drenched in a perfectly balanced sauce made of vinegar, soy sauce, sugar, and a hint of ginger and garlic. Each bite offers a rich tapestry of textures and tastes, with the crunchy outer layer of the tofu contrasting beautifully with its soft interior. The colorful medley of bell peppers and pineapple not only adds vibrant hues but also brings a fresh and tangy dimension to the dish, making it a feast for the senses. This recipe is versatile and can be served as a satisfying main course or as a delightful part of a multi-dish meal.
author: Vegor
ingredients: 14 oz firm tofu, pressed and cubed
steps: Press and cube tofu, then coat with cornstarch.
Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Fry tofu until golden and crispy.
Remove tofu and sauté garlic and ginger until fragrant.
Add bell peppers and pineapple, stir-frying for 3 minutes.
Mix soy sauce, vinegar, sugar, and ketchup in a bowl.
Cook everything together for 5 minutes, stirring until sauce is thickened and everything is well-coated.
Serve with rice or noodles.

title: Vegan Cauliflower Alfredo
description: Indulge in the creamy and delectable Vegan Cauliflower Alfredo, an inventive, plant-based twist on the classic Italian favorite. This delightful recipe replaces traditional dairy ingredients with a velvety cauliflower-based sauce, ensuring a perfect balance between rich, savory flavors and wholesome nourishment. The dish is simple, healthy, and satisfying, making it an excellent choice for both vegans and anyone eager to explore a healthier lifestyle without compromising on taste. Ideal for a family dinner or a special occasion, this Vegan Cauliflower Alfredo promises to become a staple in your culinary repertoire, offering a taste of Italy with a modern, cruelty-free spin.
author: Vegor
steps: Steam the chopped cauliflower until tender.
In a skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat and sauté garlic until fragrant.
Add steamed cauliflower, sautéed garlic, vegetable broth, almond milk, and nutritional yeast to a blender. Blend until smooth and creamy.
Season the sauce with salt and pepper.
Cook the spaghetti or pasta according to package instructions.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.

title: Vegan Baked Ziti with Homemade Ricotta
description: Vegan Baked Ziti with Homemade Ricotta is a delightful twist on the traditional Italian favorite, made completely plant-based. This hearty dish features tender ziti pasta enveloped in a rich and savory tomato sauce, layered with creamy vegan ricotta made from cashews. The vegan ricotta lends a perfect balance of creamy texture and subtle nutty flavors, enhancing the overall taste experience. The dish is baked to perfection, resulting in a golden, bubbly finish that is irresistible. Perfect for family dinners or gatherings, this vegan baked ziti is not just a wholesome meal but also a comforting one that everyone will enjoy.
author: Vegor
steps: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
Cook ziti pasta according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
In a blender, combine soaked cashews, lemon juice, nutritional yeast, garlic, salt, and pepper. Blend until smooth, creating vegan ricotta.
In a large bowl, mix cooked ziti, marinara sauce, and half of the vegan ricotta.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish. Dollop remaining ricotta on top and drizzle with olive oil.
Garnish with chopped basil before serving.

title: Spinach and Lentil Dal
description: This delightful vegan dish brings together the earthy flavors of lentils and fresh spinach, creating a rich and hearty meal that is both nutritious and satisfying. The spinach and lentils are cooked with aromatic spices, enhancing the natural flavors and providing a comforting experience. Ideal for those seeking a healthy meal, this dal is not only nourishing but also filled with protein and fiber, making it perfect for any meal of the day. Garnish with fresh cilantro and serve with warm rice or bread for a complete and balanced meal.
author: Vegor
steps: Rinse the lentils thoroughly under cold water.
In a large pot, heat oil over medium heat. Add cumin seeds and let them sizzle for a few seconds.
Add onions, garlic, and ginger, and sauté until onions are translucent.
Stir in turmeric, coriander powder, and cayenne pepper. Cook for another minute until fragrant.
Add the lentils and water to the pot. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to simmer.
Stir in garam masala, salt, and chopped spinach. Cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Adjust seasoning as needed and garnish with fresh cilantro before serving.

title: Vegan Green Bean Casserole
description: Delight in the classic taste of a green bean casserole with a vegan twist. This dish combines fresh green beans with a savory mushroom sauce and crispy onions on top. Vegan-friendly ingredients make it suitable for those adhering to plant-based diets, while maintaining the comfort and satisfaction of the traditional recipe. Its harmonious blend of tender vegetables and creamy mushroom sauce is perfect for any holiday gathering or family meal. Utilizing fresh and high-quality ingredients ensures that your culinary creation is a nutritious and delicious highlight of any dining occasion.
author: Vegor
steps: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
Trim and blanch green beans, then set aside.
In a skillet, heat olive oil and sauté mushrooms and garlic until fragrant.
Add vegetable broth and soy sauce, stirring well.
Whisk in almond milk mixed with flour, cook until thickened.
Top with crispy fried onions.
Bake for 15-20 minutes until golden.

title: Vegan Chocolate Chip Banana Bread
description: This delicious Vegan Chocolate Chip Banana Bread combines the sweetness of ripe bananas with the rich, indulgent flavor of dark chocolate chips. It’s perfect for breakfast or a snack, providing a moist and tender crumb without any of the dairy or eggs found in traditional recipes. This recipe is easy to follow and yields a delightful loaf that’s not only vegan-friendly but also irresistible to everyone, regardless of their dietary preferences. Ideal for using up overripe bananas, this banana bread will fill your kitchen with the warm, inviting aroma of freshly baked goodness.
author: Vegor
steps: Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C).
In a large bowl, mash the ripe bananas until smooth.
Mix in the melted coconut oil, brown sugar, almond milk, and vanilla extract until well combined.
Add the baking soda and salt, stirring to incorporate.
Fold in the all-purpose flour until just combined, taking care not to overmix.
Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan.
Bake for 50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Allow to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.

title: Vegan Sesame Noodles with Tofu
description: This vibrant, plant-based dish features sesame noodles and crispy tofu, making it a delightful and satisfying meal that’s both nutritious and flavorful. The nutty richness of sesame pairs beautifully with the subtle heat of ginger and the aromatic notes of garlic, creating a harmonious blend that dances on your taste buds. Served chilled or at room temperature, this dish is perfect for any occasion, offering a balance of textures and flavors that captivate the senses while adhering to a vegan diet.
author: Vegor
steps: Cook soba noodles according to package instructions, then drain and set aside.
Cut tofu into cubes and pat dry with a paper towel to remove excess moisture.
In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of sesame oil over medium heat. Add tofu cubes and pan-fry until golden and crispy on all sides, about 8-10 minutes.
In a bowl, whisk together soy sauce, rice vinegar, maple syrup, grated ginger, minced garlic, and the remaining tablespoon of sesame oil.
In a large mixing bowl, combine cooked soba noodles, crispy tofu, and the sauce. Toss to coat evenly.

title: Vegan Butternut Squash Soup
description: This Vegan Butternut Squash Soup is a delightful blend of roasted butternut squash, aromatic spices, and creamy coconut milk. The squash is roasted to perfection, enhancing its natural sweetness and flavor, before being blended with a rich base of sautéed onions and garlic. A touch of ginger adds warmth, while the coconut milk provides a velvety texture, making this soup incredibly comforting. It’s a wonderful dish to enjoy during the colder months, providing nourishment and warmth. This soup is not only vegan and dairy-free but also a healthy option for those seeking a flavorful and satisfying meal.
author: Vegor
steps: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
Peel and dice the butternut squash.
Place squash on a baking sheet, drizzle with olive oil, salt, and pepper. Roast for 25 minutes.
In a pot, sauté onion and garlic until soft.
