This pie boasts a golden, flaky crust that cradles a lusciously thick, caramel-like filling, generously studded with toasted pecans that offer a delightful crunch with every bite. Infused with the deep, rich flavors of maple syrup and vanilla, each slice is a harmonious blend of textures and tastes, making it an irresistible treat for any occasion. Whether you’re closing a festive meal or simply craving a slice of heaven, this vegan pecan pie promises a guilt-free indulgence that doesn’t compromise on flavor or texture.
author: Vegor
ingredients: 1 1/4 cups all-purpose flour (for gluten-free, use a 1:1 gluten-free flour blend)
4-6 tablespoons ice water For the Filling:
1/2 cup almond milk (or any plant-based milk)
2 cups pecans, roughly chopped (plus whole pecans for decoration)
steps: In a large bowl, whisk together flour and salt. Add solid coconut oil and use a pastry cutter or fork to blend into the flour until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Gradually add ice water, 1 tablespoon at a time, mixing until the dough comes together into a ball. Wrap in plastic wrap and chill for at least 30 minutes.
Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C). Roll out the dough on a floured surface into a circle, then transfer to a 9-inch pie dish. Trim and crimp the edges as desired.

In a saucepan over medium heat, whisk together maple syrup, brown sugar, cornstarch, almond milk, and coconut oil. Bring to a simmer, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and becomes glossy (about 5 minutes).
Remove from heat and stir in vanilla extract, salt, and chopped pecans. Pour the filling into the prepared crust, and arrange whole pecans on top for decoration. Bake:
Bake for 40-45 minutes, or until the filling is set and the crust is golden brown. If the edges of the crust begin to brown too quickly, cover them with foil.
Allow the pie to cool completely at room temperature, then chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours to set before serving.

title: Vegan Spaghetti and sudo meatballs
description: Embark on a culinary journey with our Vegan Spaghetti and Meatballs, where classic comfort meets plant-based innovation. This dish features tender, savory meatballs nestled atop a bed of al dente spaghetti, all drenched in a rich, herb-infused tomato sauce that sings with flavors. Each bite delivers the heartiness of traditional Italian cuisine, reimagined with wholesome, vegan ingredients. Perfect for cozy dinners or impressing guests, this dish proves that plant-based eating doesn’t mean compromising on taste or texture. Get ready to indulge in a guilt-free version of this beloved classic, where every forkful is a celebration of flavor and sustainability.
author: Vegor
ingredients: 1 cup canned chickpeas, rinsed and mashed
2 cups marinara sauce, homemade or store-bought
steps: In a large bowl, combine ground walnuts, mashed chickpeas, breadcrumbs, nutritional yeast, Italian seasoning, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and pepper.
Mix until well combined. Form the mixture into small balls, about the size of a tablespoon each.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add the meatballs and cook, turning occasionally, until browned on all sides, about 10-15 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
While the meatballs are cooking, bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add the spaghetti and cook according to package instructions until al dente.
Drain and return to the pot, tossing with a teaspoon of olive oil to prevent sticking.
In a saucepan, warm the marinara sauce over medium heat. Once heated through, gently stir in the cooked meatballs, coating them with the sauce.
Divide the cooked spaghetti among plates. Top with the meatball and sauce mixture.
Garnish with fresh basil and vegan Parmesan cheese, if using.

title: Crispy Sesame Tempeh Bowl
description: Dive into the vibrant world of flavors with our Crispy Sesame Tempeh Bowl, a dish that redefines plant-based gourmet with its exquisite balance of textures and tastes. This culinary masterpiece is designed to cater to both your health and your taste buds, proving once and for all that wholesome eating can be utterly delicious.
author: Vegor
ingredients: Green onions and extra sesame seeds for garnish
steps: Marinate tempeh in soy sauce, sesame oil, maple syrup ginger, and garlic for 30 minutes
Pan-fry tempeh until crispy, then pour the remaining marinade over it and sprinkle with sesame seeds
Assemble the bowl with rice, tempeh, carrots, cucumber, and avacado
Garnish with green onions and extra sesame seeds.
Serve

title: Vegan Banana Bread
description: Savor the irresistible charm of our Vegan Banana Bread, a moist, tender loaf that captures the essence of home-baked perfection. Each slice is a sweet embrace of natural banana flavor, enhanced with a hint of cinnamon and nutmeg, creating a warm, comforting aroma that fills your kitchen. This delightful bread marries the wholesomeness of ripe bananas with the richness of vegan ingredients, offering a guilt-free indulgence that’s perfect for any time of the day. Whether enjoyed as a breakfast treat, an afternoon snack, or a late-night dessert, this vegan banana bread is a testament to the simple pleasures of baking, transformed into a plant-based masterpiece.
author: Vegor
ingredients: 1/3 cup melted coconut oil or vegetable oil
1/2 cup maple syrup or agave syrup
1/4 cup plant-based milk (almond, soy, oat, etc.)
1/2 cup vegan chocolate chips or walnuts (optional)
steps: Preheat the Oven: Start by preheating your oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a 9×5 inch loaf pan or line it with parchment paper.
Mix Wet Ingredients: In a large bowl, combine the mashed bananas, melted coconut oil, maple syrup, plant-based milk, and vanilla extract. Stir until all the ingredients are well blended.
Combine Dry Ingredients: In another bowl, whisk together the all-purpose flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg.

Combine Wet and Dry Ingredients: Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, stirring until just combined. Be careful not to overmix. If using, fold in the vegan chocolate chips or walnuts.
Bake: Pour the batter into the prepared loaf pan and smooth the top with a spatula. Bake in the preheated oven for 60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Cool: Let the banana bread cool in the pan for about 10 minutes, then transfer it to a wire rack to cool completely.

title: Vegan Pizza
description: Indulge in the ultimate culinary delight with our artisanal Vegan Pizza, a masterpiece of flavors and textures that promises to enchant your taste buds. At the heart of this gastronomic creation lies a handcrafted, airy, and tender crust, golden-baked to perfection, offering a delightful crunch with every bite. Slathered generously upon this base is a rich, zesty tomato sauce, seasoned with a blend of aromatic herbs that evoke the essence of Italian countryside.
author: Vegor
ingredients: 2 1/2 cups all-purpose flour (substitute with bread flour for a crispier crust)
1 tablespoon olive oil, plus more for greasing
1/2 cup tomato sauce (you can choose a homemade or store-bought variety)
Toppings of choice (suggested: sliced bell peppers, red onions, black olives, mushrooms)
Extra virgin olive oil, for drizzling
steps: In a large mixing bowl, dissolve sugar in warm water. Sprinkle yeast over the top and let sit for about 5 minutes, until the mixture becomes frothy.
Add flour, 1 tablespoon olive oil, and salt to the yeast mixture. Stir until a dough forms. Transfer to a floured surface and knead for 5 minutes until the dough is smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a lightly oiled bowl, cover with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour, or until it has doubled in size.
Preheat the Oven: Preheat your oven to 475°F (245°C). If using a pizza stone, place it in the oven to heat as well.
Once the dough has risen, punch it down and transfer to a floured surface. Roll it out to your desired thickness and shape.
Spread the tomato sauce evenly over the dough, leaving a small border around the edge. Season with oregano, basil, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
Sprinkle the vegan mozzarella cheese over the sauce, and add your chosen toppings.
Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until the crust is golden and the cheese has melted.
After baking, let the pizza cool for a few minutes before adding fresh arugula (if using), drizzling with olive oil, and sprinkling red pepper flakes.

title: Vegan Chocolate Avocado Mousse
description: Dive into the decadent, silky smoothness of our Vegan Chocolate Avocado Mousse, a dessert that marries indulgence with wholesome goodness. Crafted from the ripest avocados and the richest cocoa, this mousse offers a luxurious texture and a deep, intense chocolate flavor that melts delightfully in your mouth. Each spoonful is a harmonious blend of natural sweetness from pure maple syrup and a hint of vanilla, creating a sophisticated palate experience that’s both bold and comforting.
author: Vegor
ingredients: 1/4 cup almond milk (or any plant-based milk)
steps: In a food processor or high-speed blender, combine the avocados, cocoa powder, almond milk, maple syrup, vanilla extract, and a pinch of salt.
Blend until the mixture is smooth and creamy.
Adjust the sweetness if needed by adding more maple syrup, one tablespoon at a time.

Chill: Transfer the mousse to individual serving dishes or a large bowl. Cover with plastic wrap, ensuring the wrap touches the surface of the mousse to prevent a skin from forming. Chill in the refrigerator for at least 1 hour, or until set.
Serve: Once chilled and set, stir the mousse to ensure a smooth texture. Serve with a dollop of vegan whipped cream and fresh berries on top for garnish.

title: Lentil Soup with Pasta
description: Dive into the heartwarming embrace of our Rustic Vegan Lentil Soup with Pasta, a dish that combines the earthy richness of lentils with the comforting familiarity of pasta. This soup is a symphony of textures and flavors, lovingly simmered in a savory broth that’s teeming with vegetables and herbs. It’s the perfect culinary hug for chilly evenings, offering both deep nourishment and delightful satisfaction in every spoonful.
author: Vegor
ingredients: 1 cup dried green or brown lentils, rinsed
1 cup diced tomatoes (fresh or canned with juice)
1 cup small pasta shapes (choose gluten-free if necessary)
Fresh parsley, chopped, for garnish, Lemon Wedge when served
steps: Prepare the Base: In a large soup pot, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the onion, garlic, carrots, and celery. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the vegetables have softened, about 5 minutes.

Simmer the Lentils: Add the lentils, bay leaf, thyme, and smoked paprika to the pot. Pour in the vegetable broth and diced tomatoes. Bring to a boil, then lower the heat and simmer, covered, for 25 minutes.

Add the Pasta: Stir in the pasta and continue to cook, uncovered, stirring occasionally, for 10-15 minutes, or until the pasta is tender and the lentils are fully cooked. If the soup thickens too much, add a little water or additional broth to reach your desired consistency.
Final Touches: Remove the bay leaf. Taste and adjust the seasoning with salt and pepper.
Serve: Ladle the soup into bowls. Garnish with fresh parsley and serve with a wedge of lemon on the side.

title: Chinese Tofu with Bamboo Shoots and Parsley
description: A light and savory stir-fry combining silky tofu, crunchy bamboo shoots, and fresh parsley in a delicate soy-based sauce. This dish exemplifies the balance of flavors and textures central to Chinese cuisine, offering a nutritious and satisfying vegan option.
author: Vegor
ingredients: 1 block (14 oz) firm tofu, drained and cubed
steps: Sesame seeds, for garnish
Press tofu with a clean kitchen towel to remove excess moisture. Cut into 1-inch cubes.
Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add garlic and ginger, sautéing until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the cubed tofu and bamboo shoots to the skillet. Stir-fry for about 5 minutes, or until the tofu is golden and the bamboo shoots are tender.
In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, rice vinegar, sesame oil, and sugar. Pour this sauce over the tofu and bamboo shoots in the skillet. Stir well to combine.
Cook for an additional 5 minutes, allowing the tofu to absorb the flavors of the sauce.
Season with salt and pepper to taste. Turn off the heat and stir in the chopped parsley.
Garnish with green onions and sesame seeds before serving.

title: Lo Mein
description: A quick and easy vegan lo mien, featuring tender noodles tossed with colorful vegetables and a rich, savory sauce, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
author: Vegor
steps: Cook noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
Heat sesame oil in a large pan over medium heat. Add garlic, carrot, bell pepper, and snap peas. Stir-fry until just tender.
Add cooked noodles, soy sauce, hoisin sauce, and sugar to the pan. Toss well to combine.
Serve garnished with spring onions and sesame seeds.

title: Crisp Quinoa Cakes
description: These crispy, golden-brown quinoa cakes make a delicious and nutritious meal or snack. Packed with protein and fiber, they’re perfect on their own, or served with a side salad or your favorite dipping sauce.
author: Vegor
ingredients: 2 flax eggs (2 tablespoons flaxseed meal mixed with 6 tablespoons water)
steps: In a large bowl, mix together the quinoa, breadcrumbs, onions, nutritional yeast, salt, pepper, and flax eggs until well combined.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Form the quinoa mixture into patties and fry for 4-5 minutes on each side, or until golden and crispy.
Serve hot, with your choice of sides or sauces.

title: Organic Ragout French Ratatouille
description: This Organic Vegetables Ragout, inspired by the classic French Ratatouille, is a vibrant celebration of summer’s bounty. Featuring a medley of fresh, organic vegetables slow-cooked to perfection, this dish highlights the natural flavors and textures of each ingredient. The addition of aromatic herbs and a rich tomato base creates a comforting, hearty stew that’s both nourishing and satisfying. Perfect as a standalone main course or as a complement to your favorite grain, this ratatouille is a testament to the simplicity and beauty of plant-based cooking.
author: Vegor
steps: Heat olive oil in a large pan over medium heat. Add onion and garlic, sauté until soft.
Add eggplant, zucchinis, and bell peppers. Cook for about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the tomatoes, tomato paste, thyme, rosemary, salt, and pepper. Cover and simmer for 20 minutes, or until vegetables are tender.
Adjust seasoning to taste. Garnish with fresh basil leaves before serving.

title: Vegan Ramen
description: Immerse your senses in a bowl of vegan ramen that’s as nourishing as it is flavor-packed. Begin your culinary journey with a rich, savory broth infused with miso paste, the heart and soul of this dish. The miso lends a deep umami backbone, perfectly complementing the aromatic duo of garlic and ginger. These quintessential Asian ingredients promise a broth that’s both warming and invigorating, with each spoonful awakening your palate.
author: Vegor
steps: In a large pot, combine vegetable broth, water, soy sauce, miso paste, garlic, and ginger. Bring to a simmer.
Add the noodles and cook according to package instructions.
Add mushrooms, spinach, and carrot to the pot and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Serve the ramen in bowls, topped with green onions and sesame seeds.

title: Lentil Meatballs
description: Indulge in the hearty, comforting embrace of our Vegan Lentil Meatballs, a culinary creation that brings together the wholesomeness of plant-based ingredients with the rich flavors of classic home cooking. Perfectly browned and boasting a satisfyingly firm yet tender texture, these meatballs are a testament to the versatility and depth that vegan cuisine can offer.
author: Vegor
ingredients: 2 flax eggs (2 tablespoons flaxseed meal mixed with 6 tablespoons water)
steps: In a large bowl, mix together the quinoa, breadcrumbs, onions, nutritional yeast, salt, pepper, and flax eggs until well combined.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Form the quinoa mixture into patties and fry for 4-5 minutes on each side, or until golden and crispy.
Serve hot, with your choice of sides or sauces.

title: Vegan Tikka Masala
description: Embark on a culinary adventure with our Vegan Tikka Masala, a dish that captures the essence of traditional Indian flavors while embracing the heart of plant-based eating. Each bite of this exquisite creation is a testament to the rich and vibrant tapestry of spices that define Indian cuisine, all harmoniously blended to offer an experience that’s both comforting and exhilarating.
author: Vegor
ingredients: 1 block extra-firm tofu, pressed and cubed
steps: Marinate tofu cubes in vegan yogurt mixed with garam masala, turmeric, cumin, and lemon juice for at least 1 hour or overnight.
In a large pan, sauté onion, garlic, and ginger until soft.
Add the marinated tofu and cook for 5 minutes.
Add crushed tomatoes and coconut milk, and simmer for 20 minutes.
Season with salt, garnish with cilantro, and serve with rice.

title: Shepherd’s Pie
description: Experience the cozy warmth of our Shepherd’s Pie, a plant-based rendition of the classic comfort food that brings together the heartiness of traditional cuisine with the benefits of vegan ingredients. This dish is a symphony of textures and flavors, meticulously layered to offer a comforting embrace with every forkful.
author: Vegor
ingredients: 2 cups vegetable broth2 tbsp tomato paste
steps: For the filling, heat olive oil in a pan. Add onion, garlic, carrots, and celery. Cook until softened.
Add lentils, vegetable broth, tomato paste, rosemary, thyme, salt, and pepper. Bring to a boil, then simmer until lentils are cooked, about 25 minutes. Stir in frozen peas.
For the mashed potatoes, boil potatoes until tender. Drain and mash with vegan butter, almond milk, salt, and pepper.
Spread the filling in a baking dish. Top with mashed potatoes. Bake for 20 minutes, or until the top is golden.
Serve

title: Coconut Yogurt Parfait
description: Indulge in a culinary symphony of flavors with our exquisite Coconut Yogurt Parfait. Imagine layers of velvety coconut yogurt, each spoonful a luscious fusion of creamy sweetness and tropical freshness. Nestled between these creamy clouds are vibrant strata of juicy tropical fruits – succulent mango slices, tangy pineapple chunks, and ripe, ruby-red strawberries – adding bursts of color and natural sweetness. As you delve deeper, you’ll discover a tantalizing crunch from a sprinkle of toasted coconut flakes and a scattering of crunchy granola, adding delightful texture to each spoonful. Drizzled with a delicate ribbon of golden honey or maple syrup, this parfait is a celebration of pure indulgence, promising a symphony of taste and texture with every spoonful.
author: Vegor
steps: In serving glass, layer coconut yogurt, granola, and berries
Top with shredded coconut and drizzle of maple syrup
Serve

title: Dragon fruit Smoothie
description: Unveil a tropical paradise with every sip of our Dragon Fruit Smoothie, a vibrant concoction that mesmerizes with its dazzling magenta hue and a taste that captures the exotic essence of faraway lands. This smoothie isn’t just a drink; it’s an experience, blending the unique, mildly sweet flavor of dragon fruit with a creamy, luxurious texture that glides over your palate like silk.
author: Vegor
steps: Place all ingredients in a blender
Blend on high until smooth
Adjust sweetness with agave syrup if desired
Serve Immediately

title: Lentil Bolognese
description: Savor the rich, deep flavors of our Lentil Bolognese, a dish that marries the heartiness of lentils with the classic Italian bolognese sauce, creating a symphony of taste that’s both comforting and delightfully satisfying. This plant-based masterpiece is a testament to the beauty of simplicity, transforming humble ingredients into a gourmet experience that will tantalize your taste buds and leave you craving more.
author: Vegor
steps: Heat olive oil in a large pan over a medium heat
Add onion and garlic sauté until soft
Stir in lentils, crushed tomatoes, tomato paste, oregano, basil, salt, and pepper
Pour in vegetable broth and red wine; bring to a boil
Reduce heat and simmer for 25-30 minutes, or until lentils are tender.
Serve over cooked pasta or zucchini noodles

title: Indian Chickpea Curry
description: Transport your taste buds to the vibrant streets of Mumbai with our tantalizing Indian chickpea curry. Picture tender chunks of succulent chicken or vegetables, simmered in a rich, aromatic sauce bursting with a symphony of spices – from earthy cumin and coriander to fiery chili and sweet-scented cardamom.
author: Vegor
steps: Heat coconut oil in a pan.
Add Onion, garlic and ginger.
Sauté until soft
Add chickpeas, tomatoes, coconut milk, garam masala, and turmeric

title: Bombay Burritos
description: Feast your senses on the Bombay Burritos, a culinary masterpiece where the vibrant streets of Mumbai meet the hearty comfort of a Mexican wrap. This fusion delicacy is a testament to the magic that happens when two rich culinary traditions unite, offering a taste experience that’s as bold and adventurous as it is comforting and familiar.
author: Vegor
steps: Lemon Wedges for serving
Heat oil in a pan, add cumin seeds until they splutter
Add onion, garlic, and ginger, cook until onions are translucent
Add potatoes and cauliflower, cooking until half done
Stir in peas, tomatoes and all the spices, cooking until the vegetables are tender
Warm tortillas according to the package instructions
Divide the vegetable mixture amou8nt the tortillas, roll up tightly
Garnish with cilantro and serve with lemon wedges
Serve

title: Butternut Squash Risotto
description: A creamy, comforting risotto enriched with the sweetness of butternut squash, the subtle onion-like flavor of leeks, and the freshness of spinach. This dish is a perfect blend of flavors and textures, making it an ideal vegan main course for a cozy night in.
author: Vegor
ingredients: Nutritional yeast (Optional) for the cheesy flavor
steps: Heat olive oil in large pan over medium heat
Add leeks and sute until soft
Add butternut squash and arborio rice, stirring to coat with oil
Gradually add vegetable broth, one cup at a time, stirring frequently until liquid is absorbed before adding more.
Once the rice and squash are tender and the risotto is creamy, fold the spinach until wilted
Season with salt and pepper.
Sprinkle with nutritional yeast if desired
Serve

title: Portobello Tacos
description: Juicy, marinated portobello mushrooms serve as the meaty centerpiece of these tacos, stuffed into warm tortillas and topped with a vibrant array of vegetables and a creamy avocado sauce for a delightful Mexican-inspired feast.
author: Vegor
steps: Marinate portobello sliced in olive oil, soy sauce, paprika, cumin, and chili powder for 30 minutes
Grill or saute mushrooms until tender
Mix mashed avocado with lime juice, salt, and pepper to make the sauce
Warm tortillas, then fill with mushroom cabbage, and cilantro
Drizzle with avocado sauce before serving
Serve

title: Vegan Breakfast Bar
description: Imagine starting your day with a Vegan Breakfast Bar, a delightfully nutritious and utterly delicious way to greet the morning. This isn’t just any breakfast bar; it’s a carefully crafted mosaic of flavors and textures, designed to energize your body and tantalize your taste buds from the first bite.
author: Vegor
steps: Preheat oven to 350F (175C)
Mix all ingredients in a bowl until well combined
Press mixture into a lined baking pan.
Bake for 20 minutes
Cool and cut into bars
Serve or pack for later!

title: Chia Seed Pudding
description: Chia seed pudding is a sumptuously creamy and delightful dessert that serves as a testament to the power of simple ingredients coming together to create a burst of flavors and textures
author: Vegor
steps: Mix all ingredients in a bowl and whisk well to avoid clumping
Refrigerate for at least 4 hours or overnight until set
stir before serving and add toppings as desired.

title: Mexican Quinoa Stuffed Peppers
description: Indulge in the vibrant and wholesome delight of Mexican Quinoa Stuffed Peppers, a dish that encapsulates the spirit of Mexican cuisine with a healthful twist. Each bell pepper, chosen for its bright color and sweet flavor, serves as a vessel for the richly seasoned, aromatic filling that lies within, promising a culinary adventure with every bite.
author: Vegor
ingredients: 4 large bell peppers, halved and seeded
steps: Preheat over to 375F (190C)
In a bowl, mix quinoa, black beans, corn, tomato sauce, cumin, and paprika.
Season bowl with salt and pepper
Stuff each pepper half with the quinoa mixture
Place in a baking dish
Top with vegan cheese
Bake for 25-30 mins
serve

title: Grilled Vegan Eggplant Steaks
description: These grilled eggplant steaks can be served as a side dish or as a main course alongside quinoa, couscous, or your favorite grains. They are flavorful and can be a great addition to sandwiches, salads, or bowls. Feel free to experiment with different seasonings and sauces to suit your taste.
author: Vegor
ingredients: 2 large eggplants, sliced into 1/2 inch thick steaks
steps: Preheat grill to medium-high heat
Brush eggplant steaks with olive oil, garlic, salt, pepper, and paprika
Grill for 5 minutes on each side or until tender
Serve

title: Greek Salad
description: It’s all Greek Salad to me, and I couldn’t be more pleased with the translation! Crunchy, chunky, vibrant veggies and creamy feta come to life in a light, herby Mediterranean dressing.
author: Vegor
steps: In a large bowl, combine the tomatoes, cucumber, onion, oliversr, caper, and vegan feta.
Drizle with olive oil and red wine vinegar
season with salt and pepper, oregano
toss gently
serve

title: Fruit Granola Smoothie Bowl
description: This Vegan Blueberry Breakfast Bowl is a combination of all my favorites. The creamy smoothie base is made up of 5 simple ingredients – banana, blueberries, almond milk, dates, and peanut butter. Then topped it with my homemade GF Vegan Crunchy Chocolate Granola, which I shared in my last post – seriously so yummy! Along with fresh blueberries, strawberries, creamy peanut butter and vegan chocolate.
author: Vegor
ingredients: 1 cup almond milk (or any plant-based milk)
1 tablespoon peanut butter, plus more for topping
Optional: Chia seeds, hemp seeds, or coconut flakes for extra texture and nutrition
steps: Blend the Smoothie: In a blender, combine the frozen banana, frozen strawberries, frozen blueberries, almond milk, 1 tablespoon of peanut butter, and flaxseed meal (if using). Blend on high until smooth and creamy. Adjust the consistency by adding more almond milk if necessary.
Assemble the Bowl: Pour the smoothie mixture into two bowls. Use the back of a spoon to smooth the top.

Add the Toppings: Arrange the fresh strawberry slices and blueberries on top of the smoothie base. Sprinkle granola over the berries. Drizzle peanut butter generously over the top. If desired, add chia seeds, hemp seeds, or coconut flakes for an extra nutritional boost.

Serve Immediately: Enjoy your Berry Bliss Granola Smoothie Bowl right away for the best texture and flavor. It’s a delightful way to savor the freshness of the season, packed with antioxidants, fiber, and protein to fuel your day.

title: Vegan Pancakes
description: Elevate your taste buds with our sensational Vegan Chickpea and Vegetable Stir-Fry a symphony of colors, textures, and flavors that promises to delight the senses and satisfy the soul.
author: Vegor
steps: In a bowl, mix flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
Whisk in almond milk, oil, and vanilla until smooth.
Pour batter onto a heated non-stick pan. Cook until bubbles form, flip and cook until golden.

title: Vegan Tofu Scramble
description: This easy vegan Tofu Scramble with Veggies takes only 10 minutes to cook and makes a nutritious and delicious savory breakfast. This customizable recipe is perfect for meal prep and the whole family will enjoy it.
author: Vegor
steps: heat olive oil in pan
Add onion and bell pepper and saute until soft
Add crumbled tofu, turmeric, paprika, salt and pepper
Cook for 5-7 minutes
stir in nutritional yeast
Serve Warm

title: Japanese Edamame Salad
description: Indulge in the vibrant and refreshing taste of Japanese Edamame, a delightful appetizer that captures the essence of simplicity and flavor. These young, tender soybeans, harvested at the peak of their sweetness, are gently boiled to perfection and served with a sprinkle of sea salt, creating a harmonious balance of savory and slightly nutty flavors.
author: Vegor
steps: In a bowl, mix edamame, cucumber, and carrot
In a smaller powl  whisk together soy sauce, rice vinigar, sesame oil, and sesame seeds
Pour dressing over salad, toss to combine.
Season with salt and pepper

title: Vegan Lentil Soup
description: Dive into the comforting embrace of Vegan Lentil Soup, a heartwarming bowl of nourishment and flavor. This rustic and hearty soup combines tender, protein-packed lentils with a medley of finely chopped vegetables, all simmered slowly to meld the flavors into a rich and satisfying broth.
author: Vegor
steps: Heat olive oil in a large pot. Add unions, carrots, celery and garlic.  Saute until softened.
Add lentils, bay leaf, thyme, broth, and water. Bring to a boil, then simer for 30-40 minutes

title: Spaghetti with Tomato Basil Sauce
description: It is simple, classic Italian fare that makes the most of summer’s tomatoes, but you can also make it with hothouse offerings and it will be delicious.
author: Vegor
steps: Cook spaghetti according to package instructions
Heat olive oil in a pan. Add onion and garlic, sauté until soft.
Add tomatoes, simer for 15 minutes. Stir in basil season with salt and pepper
serve sauce over spaghetti

title: Chickpea and Vegetable Stir-Fry
description: Dive into a burst of refreshing vitality with our enticing Vegan Smoothie Bowl, a vibrant symphony of flavors and nourishment that will elevate your mornings to new heights.
author: Vegor
ingredients: 1/2 cup plant-based milk (almond, soy, or coconut)
Toppings: granola, sliced fruits, nuts, seeds, coconut flakes
1 can (15 oz) chickpeas, drained and rinsed,
2 tablespoons soy sauce (or tamari for gluten-free option)
steps: Blend the frozen banana, frozen berries, and plant-based milk until smooth.
Pour the smoothie into a bowl.
Top with your favorite toppings.
Prepare all the vegetables by washing, peeling, and cutting them into bite-sized pieces. Make sure the chickpeas are drained and rinsed.,
Heat the olive oil in a large pan or wok over medium heat. Add the diced onion and minced garlic. Sauté for about 2-3 minutes until the onion becomes translucent.,
To the pan, add the sliced bell peppers, zucchini, carrot, and broccoli. Stir-fry for about 5-7 minutes, or until the vegetables are just tender but still crisp.

Stir in the chickpeas, soy sauce, maple syrup, and grated ginger. If using, add the sesame oil now for an extra layer of flavor. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Cook for another 5 minutes, stirring occasionally to ensure the vegetables and chickpeas are well-coated with the sauce and heated through.

Once everything is cooked and nicely combined, remove from heat. Serve your Vegan Chickpea and Vegetable Stir-Fry hot. For a final touch, sprinkle sesame seeds and sliced green onions on top for garnish.

title: Avacado Toast
description: Tasty, seasoned avocado spread on your favorite choice of food. A simple and healthy food that can be good for any meal or just an easy snack!
author: admin
ingredients: 2 slices of bread (choose your favorite type, such as whole wheat, sourdough, or gluten-free)
Optional toppings: sliced tomatoes, red pepper flakes, sprouts, microgreens, hemp seeds, or nutritional yeast
steps: Toast the bread slices until they are golden and crispy.
While the bread is toasting, cut the avocado in half and remove the pit. Scoop the flesh into a bowl.
Mash the avocado with a fork until it reaches your desired consistency. You can leave it slightly chunky or make it smooth and creamy.
Add the lemon juice to the mashed avocado and mix well. The lemon juice adds brightness and helps prevent the avocado from browning.
Season the avocado mixture with salt and pepper to taste. Adjust the seasoning according to your preference.
Once the bread is toasted, spread a generous amount of the mashed avocado mixture onto each slice.

Now comes the fun part – add your favorite toppings! You can slice some tomatoes and layer them on top of the avocado, sprinkle with red pepper flakes for a kick of heat, add sprouts or microgreens for freshness, sprinkle with hemp seeds for extra crunch and nutrition, or sprinkle with nutritional yeast for a cheesy flavor.
Serve the vegan avocado toast immediately and enjoy!
Avocado toast is a versatile dish, so feel free to get creative and experiment with different toppings and seasonings. It makes for a delicious and nutritious breakfast, brunch, or snack.

title: Cauliflower Wings
description: Cauliflower wings that will make your mouth water covered in a delicious buffalo sauce made with Frank’s Red-hot sauce. Preparation might take awhile but it’s well worth it.!
author: admin
ingredients: 1 cup plant-based milk (such as almond or soy milk)
1/2 cup hot sauce (such as Frank’s Red-hot)
1 tablespoon maple syrup or agave nectar
1/2 teaspoon smoked paprika (optional, for smoky flavor)
steps: Preheat your oven to 450°F (230°C) and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, plant-based milk, garlic powder, paprika, salt, and black pepper until you have a smooth batter.
Dip each cauliflower floret into the batter, ensuring it is fully coated. Shake off any excess batter.
Place the coated cauliflower florets on the prepared baking sheet, leaving a little space between each piece. Repeat until all the florets are coated.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the cauliflower is tender and golden brown.

While the cauliflower is baking, prepare the buffalo sauce. In a small bowl, whisk together the hot sauce, melted vegan butter, maple syrup or agave nectar, apple cider vinegar, garlic powder, and smoked paprika (if using).
Once the cauliflower is cooked, remove it from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Toss the baked cauliflower florets in the buffalo sauce until they are well coated. You can use a spoon or tongs to gently toss them.
Return the coated cauliflower to the baking sheet and bake for an additional 10-12 minutes, or until the sauce has slightly caramelized and the cauliflower is crispy.

title: Chickpea Curry
description: Dive into a world of enticing flavors with our Chickpea Curry, a culinary marvel that transforms humble ingredients into a symphony of taste.
author: admin
ingredients: 2 cans (14 ounces each) chickpeas, drained and rinsed
steps: Heat the vegetable oil in a large pot or skillet over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and cook until it becomes translucent, stirring occasionally.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the pot and sautÃ© for about 1 minute, until fragrant.
In a small bowl, combine the curry powder, cumin, coriander, turmeric, and cayenne pepper (if using) to make a spice mixture.
Add the spice mixture to the pot and stir well to coat the onions, garlic, and ginger.
Pour in the diced tomatoes (including the juice) and coconut milk. Stir to combine the ingredients.
Add the drained and rinsed chickpeas to the pot, followed by the vegetable broth. Stir everything together and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and let it cook for about 15-20 minutes, stirring occasionally. This allows the flavors to meld together and the sauce to thicken slightly.
Once the curry has thickened to your desired consistency, remove it from the heat.
Serve the vegan chickpea curry over cooked rice or with naan bread. Garnish with fresh chopped cilantro.

title: Chocolate Chip Cookies
description: Indulge in the vibrant and refreshing taste of Japanese Edamame, a delightful appetizer that captures the essence of simplicity and flavor. These young, tender soybeans, harvested at the peak of their sweetness, are gently boiled to perfection and served with a sprinkle of sea salt, creating a harmonious balance of savory and slightly nutty flavors. Dive into the comforting embrace of Vegan Lentil Soup, a heartwarming bowl of nourishment and flavor. This rustic and hearty soup combines tender, protein-packed lentils with a medley of finely chopped vegetables, all simmered slowly to meld the flavors into a rich and satisfying broth. Freshly baked chocolate chip cookies that will melt in your mouth eggless and still just as tasty! Dig into these bad boys and treat yourself.
author: Vegor
ingredients: 1/4 cup almond milk (or any other non-dairy milk)
steps: In a bowl, mix edamame, cucumber, and carrot
In a smaller powl  whisk together soy sauce, rice vinigar, sesame oil, and sesame seeds
Pour dressing over salad, toss to combine.
Season with salt and pepper
Heat olive oil in a large pot. Add unions, carrots, celery and garlic.  Saute until softened.
Add lentils, bay leaf, thyme, broth, and water. Bring to a boil, then simer for 30-40 minutes
Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C) and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a medium-sized bowl, whisk together the flour, baking soda, and salt. Set aside.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the melted coconut oil and brown sugar. Stir until well combined and the sugar has dissolved.
Add the almond milk and vanilla extract to the coconut oil and sugar mixture. Stir until well combined.
Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, stirring until a dough forms. Be careful not to overmix.
Fold in the vegan chocolate chips until evenly distributed throughout the dough.

Use a cookie scoop or spoon to drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto the prepared baking sheet, spacing them about 2 inches apart. You can flatten the dough slightly with the back of a spoon if desired.
Bake in the preheated oven for 10 to 12 minutes, or until the edges are golden brown.
Remove from the oven and allow the cookies to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes, then transfer them to a wire rack to cool completely.

title: Sneaky pumpkin and cheese muffins
description: These easy savoury muffins are packed with cheese, pumpkin and hidden vegetables such as leek and capsicum. The kids will never know! steps: In a big bowl combine all ingredients
Whisk thoroughly
Preheat oven to 350 degrees
Bake for 6 hours

title: Yellow summer squash soup with curry spices
description: A Yellow crookneck squash go particularly well with these spices, but golden zucchini and sunburst pattypans or any summer squash can also be used with good effect. If you are picking squash from your garden and have squash blossoms, use one or two finely chopped along with the cilantro as a garnish.
author: admin
ingredients: 1/4 teaspoon ground cinnamon, or 1 inch piece of cinnamon stick
1/2 tablespoon cilantro leaves chopped for garnish
steps: Heat the clarified butter, add the onion and the squash and cook over medium heat, for 5 to 10 minutes stirring as necessary
Gather all the dried spices together and grind them to a powder in an electric spice mill
Add then to the onion and the squash, .along with the cinnamon, cayenne, ginger root, turmeric, salt and 1/2 cup of water or stock and continue to cook over medium heat for five minutes.
Poor in the rest of water or stock bring to a boil and then lower the heat and simmer. for 15 minutes
Pass the soup thru a food mill or puree it in a blender
Return the soup to the stove and stir in the cream
Taste for salt and add more if necessary. Because some squash are less watery than others the soup may need additional water or cream.
Serve the soup garnished with the cilantro and squash blossoms.
